sentence: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

sentence: Liggins followed in his father’s footsteps and entered a career in medicine.

sentence: His research showed that if a hormone was administered it would speed up the baby's foetal lung maturation.

sentence: Out of 1,400 people polled prior to the 2010 federal election, those who oppose Australia becoming a republic grew by 8 per cent since 2008.

sentence: Gold may be worked into all sorts of shapes. It can be rolled into tiny shapes.

sentence: This is called a chemical's pH. You can make an indicator using red cabbage juice.
sentence_translated: Seda nimetatakse kemikaali pH-ks. Sa saad teha indikaatori punase kapsa mahlast.

sentence: The cabbage juice changes color depending on how acidic or basic (alkaline) the chemical is.
sentence_translated: Kapsa mahl muutub värvi sõltuvalt sellest, kui happeline või aluseline (aluselise) kemikaal on.

sentence: The pH level is indicated by the amount of Hydrogen (the H in pH) ions in the tested chemical.
sentence_translated: pH tase näitab vesiniku (H pH-s) ioonide hulka testitavas kemikaalis.

sentence: Hydrogen ions are protons that had their electrons stripped off them (since Hydrogen atoms consist of one proton and one electron).
sentence_translated: Vesinikioonid on prootonid, kelle elektronid on eemaldatud (kuna vesiniku aatomid koosnevad ühest prootonist ja ühest elektronist).

sentence: Swirl the two dry powders together and then, with clean wet hands, squeeze them into a ball.
sentence_translated: Segage kaks kuiva pulbrit omavahel ja siis, puhaste niiskete kätega, pigistage need palliks.

sentence: The moisture on your hands will react with the outer layers, which will feel funny and form a sort of shell.
sentence_translated: Käte niiskus reageerib välimiste kihtidega, mis tunduvad naljakad ja moodustavad omamoodi kest.

sentence: The cities of Harappa and Mohenjo-daro had a flush toilet in almost every house, attached to a sophisticated sewage system.
sentence_translated: Linnades Harappa ja Mohenjo-daro oli peaaegu igas majas veetõusutoruga tualett, mis oli ühendatud keeruka kanalisatsioonisüsteemiga.

sentence: Remains of sewage systems have been found in the houses of the Minoan cities of Crete and Santorini in Greece.
sentence_translated: Kreetal ja Santorinil Kreekas on leitud minoalaste linnade majade kanalisatsioonisüsteemide jäänuseid.

sentence: There were also toilets in ancient Egypt, Persia and China. In Roman civilization, toilets were sometimes part of public bath houses where men and women were together in mixed company.
sentence_translated: Vana Egiptuses, Peresis ja Hiinas olid samuti tualetid. Rooma tsivilisatsioonis olid tualetid mõnikord osa avalikest vannidest, kus mehed ja naised viibisid segas seltskonnas.

sentence: When you call someone who is thousands of miles away, you are using a satellite.
sentence_translated: Kui helistate kellelegi, kes on tuhandete miilide kaugusel, kasutate satelliiti.

sentence: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.
sentence_translated: Satelliit kosmoses saab kõne ja peegeldab selle peaaegu koheselt tagasi.

sentence: The satellite was sent into space by a rocket. Scientists use telescopes in space because the Earth’s atmosphere distorts some of our light and view.
sentence_translated: Satelliit saadeti kosmosesse raketi abil. Teadlased kasutavad kosmoses teleskoope, kuna Maa atmosfäär moonutab osa meie valgusest ja vaateväljast.

sentence: It takes a giant rocket over a 100 feet high to put a satellite or telescope in space.
sentence_translated: Satteliidi või teleskoobi kosmosesse saatmiseks on vajalik hiiglaslik rakett, mis on üle 100 jala kõrge.

sentence: The wheel has changed the world in incredible ways. The biggest thing that the wheel has done for us is given us much easier and faster transportation.
sentence_translated: Ratas on muutnud maailma uskumatul viisil. Suurim asi, mida ratas meie heaks on teinud, on andnud meile palju lihtsama ja kiirema transpordi.

sentence: It has brought us the train, the car, and many other transportation devices.

sentence: Under them are more medium sized cats that eat medium sized prey ranging from rabbits to antelopes and deer.
sentence_translated: Nende all on rohkem keskmise suurusega kasse, kes söövad keskmise suurusega saaki, alates jänestest kuni antiloopide ja hirvedeni.

sentence: Finally, there are many small cats (including loose pet cats) that eat the far more numerous small prey like insects, rodents, lizards, and birds.
sentence_translated: Lõpuks on palju väikeseid kasse (sealhulgas vabalt ringi liikuvad kodukassid), kes söövad palju arvukamaid väikeseid saaki nagu putukad, närilised, sisalikud ja linnud.

sentence: The secret to their success is the concept of the niche, a special job each cat holds that keeps it from competing with others.
sentence_translated: Nende edu saladus on nišši kontseptsioon, eriline töö, mida iga kass täidab, mis hoiab neid konkurentsist eemal.

sentence: Lions are the most social cats, living in large groups called prides.
sentence_translated: Lõvid on kõige sotsiaalsemad kassid, elades suurtes gruppides, mida nimetatakse uhkusteks.

sentence: Prides are made up of one to three related adult males, along with as many as thirty females and cubs.
sentence_translated: Pride koosneb ühest kuni kolmest seotud täiskasvanud isasloomast, koos kuni kolmekümne emaslooma ja pesakonnaga.

sentence: The females are usually closely related to each other, being a large family of sisters and daughters.
sentence_translated: Emased on tavaliselt omavahel tihedalt seotud, olles suur õdede ja tütarde perekond.

sentence: Lion prides act much like packs of wolves or dogs, animals surprisingly similar to lions (but not other big cats) in behavior, and also very deadly to their prey.
sentence_translated: Lõvide uhked käituvad nagu huntide või koerte karjad, loomad, kes on käitumiselt üllatavalt sarnased lõvidele (aga mitte teistele suurtele kassidele) ja on samuti oma saagile väga surmavad.

sentence: A well rounded athlete, the tiger can climb (though not well), swim, leap great distances and pull with five times the force of a strong human.
sentence_translated: Hästi arenenud sportlasena suudab tiiger ronida (kuigi mitte hästi), ujuda, hüpata suuri vahemaid ja tõmmata viie korra võrra tugevama jõu kui tugev inimene.

sentence: The tiger is in the same group (Genus Panthera) as lions, leopards, and jaguars. These four cats are the only ones who can roar.
sentence_translated: Tiiger kuulub samasse rühma (perekond Panthera) nagu lõvid, leopardid ja jaguarid. Need neli kassi on ainsad, kes suudavad müriseda.

sentence: The tiger's roar is not like the full-voiced roar of a lion, but more like a sentence of snarly, shouted words.
sentence_translated: Tiigri mürin ei ole nagu lõvi tämbrikas mürin, vaid rohkem nagu sõnade karjumine, mis on tõre ja hüüdnud.

sentence: Ocelots like to eat small animals. They will catch monkeys, snakes, rodents and birds if they can. Almost all of the animals that the ocelot hunts are far smaller than it is.
sentence_translated: Ocelotid armastavad süüa väikseid loomi. Nad püüavad ahve, madusid, närilisi ja linde, kui nad saavad. Peaaegu kõik loomad, keda ocelot jahtima läheb, on temast palju väiksemad.

sentence: Scientists think that ocelots follow and find animals to eat (prey) by smell, sniffing for where they've been on the ground.
sentence_translated: Teadlased arvavad, et ocelotid järgivad ja leiavad toitu (saaki) lõhna järgi, nuusutades, kust nad maapinnal on käinud.

sentence: They can see very well in the dark with night vision, and move very stealthily, too. Ocelots hunt their prey by blending in with their surroundings then pouncing on their prey.
sentence_translated: Nad näevad pimedas väga hästi öise nägemise abil ja liiguvad samuti väga varjatult. Ocelotid jahtivad oma saaki, sulandudes oma ümbritsevasse keskkonda ja siis rünnates oma saaki.

sentence: When a small group of living things (a small population) gets separated from the main population that they came from (like if they move over a mountain range or a river, or if they move to a new island so that they can't easily move back) they will often find themselves in a different environment than they were in before.
sentence_translated: Kui väike rühm elusolendeid (väike populatsioon) eraldub peamisest populatsioonist, kust nad tulid (näiteks kui nad liiguvad üle mäeaheliku või jõe, või kui nad liiguvad uuele saarele, nii et nad ei saa kergesti tagasi liikuda), leiavad nad sageli end erinevas keskkonnas kui nad olid varem.

sentence: This new environment has different resources and different competitors, so the new population will need different features or adaptations to be a strong competitor than what they had needed before.
sentence_translated: See uus keskkond omab erinevaid ressursse ja erinevaid konkurente, seega vajab uus populatsioon erinevaid omadusi või kohandusi, et olla tugev konkurent võrreldes sellega, mida nad varem vajasid.

sentence: The original population hasn't changed at all, they still need the same adaptations as before.
sentence_translated: Algne populatsioon ei ole üldse muutunud, nad vajavad endiselt samu kohandusi nagu varem.

sentence: Over time, as the new population begins to adapt to their new environment, they start to look less and less like the other population.
sentence_translated: Aja jooksul, kui uus elanikkond hakkab kohanema oma uue keskkonnaga, hakkavad nad üha vähem ja vähem sarnanema teise elanikkonnaga.

sentence: Eventually, after thousands or even millions of years, the two populations will look so different that they can't be called the same species.
sentence_translated: Lõpuks, pärast tuhandeid või isegi miljoneid aastaid, näevad kaks populatsiooni välja nii erinevad, et neid ei saa enam nimetada samaks liigiks.

sentence: We call this process speciation, which just means the formation of new species. Speciation is an unavoidable consequence and a very important part of evolution.
sentence_translated: Me nimetame seda protsessi spekatsiooniks, mis tähendab lihtsalt uute liikide teket. Spekatsioon on vältimatu tagajärg ja väga oluline osa evolutsioonist.

sentence_translated: Küla ise, mis on ajaga vastu pidanud, annab väga elava pildi Muhammadi vaimsetest kalduvustest.

sentence: Resting on the top of one of the mountains north of Mecca, the cave is completely isolated from the rest of the world.
sentence_translated: Üks Mecca põhjaosas asuvatest mägedest asuv koobas asub täielikult maailmast eraldatuna.

sentence: In fact, it is not easy to find at all even if one knew it existed. Once inside the cave, it is a total isolation.
sentence_translated: Tegelikult ei ole seda üldse lihtne leida, isegi kui keegi teab, et see eksisteerib. Kui olla koopas sees, on see täielik isolatsioon.

sentence: Nothing can be seen other than the clear, beautiful sky above and the many surrounding mountains. Very little of this world can be seen or heard from inside the cave.
sentence_translated: Käe kohal on näha ainult selget ja kaunist taevast ning paljusid ümbritsevaid mägesid. Väga vähe sellest maailmast on koopast sees nähtav või kuulda.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: The Great Pyramid at Giza is the only one of the seven wonders that is still standing today.
sentence_translated: Giza Suur Püramiid on ainus seitsmest imest, mis on tänapäeval endiselt püsti.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: Built by the Egyptians in the third century BCE, the Great Pyramid is one of many large pyramid structures built to honor dead Pharaoh.
sentence_translated: Egiptlaste poolt kolmandal sajandil eKr ehitatud Suur Püramiid on üks paljusid suuri püramiidistruktuure, mis ehitati surnud faaraode austamiseks.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: The Giza Plateau, or "Giza Necropolis" in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids (of which the great pyramid is the largest), several small tombs, several temples, and the great Sphinx.
sentence_translated: Giza platoo, tuntud ka kui "Giza nekropol" Egiptuse surnute orus, sisaldab mitmeid pyramide (mille hulgas on suur püramiid suurim), mitmeid väikeseid haudu, mitmeid templeid ja suurt Sfinksi.

topic: seven wonders of the world/pyramid at giza
sentence: The great pyramid was created to honor the Pharaoh Khufu, and many of the smaller pyramids, tombs, and temples were built to honor Khufu's wives and family members.
sentence_translated: Suure püramiidi ehitamine toimus, et austada faarao Khufu't, ning paljusid väiksemaid püramiide, haudu ja templeid ehitati Khufu naiste ja pereliikmete austamiseks.

sentence: The "up bow" mark looks like a V and the "down bow mark" like a staple or a square missing its bottom side.
sentence_translated: "Ülespoole" märk näeb välja nagu V ja "Allapoole" märk nagu klamber või ruut, mille alumine külg puudub.

sentence: Up means you should start at the tip and push the bow, and down means you should start at the frog (which is where your hand is holding the bow) and pull the bow.
sentence_translated: "Üles" tähendab, et peaksid alustama tipust ja tõukama viiulikeelt, ja "alla" tähendab, et peaksid alustama kaelast (koht, kus su käsi hoiab viiulikeelt) ja tõmbama viiulikeelt.

sentence: An up-bow usually generates a softer sound, while a down-bow is stronger and more assertive.
sentence_translated: Ülespoole tõmme genereerib tavaliselt pehmema heli, samas kui allapoole tõmme on tugevam ja enesekehtivam.

sentence: Feel free to pencil in your own marks, but remember the printed bowing marks are there for a musical reason, so they should usually be respected.
sentence_translated: Tunne end vabalt oma märkide tegemisel, kuid pea meeles, et trükitud noodi kaaremärgid on seal muusikalisel põhjusel, seega tuleks neid tavaliselt austada.

sentence: The terrified King Louis XVI, Queen Marie Antoinette their two young children (11 year old Marie Therese and four year old Louis-Charles) and the King's sister, Madam Elizabeth, on the 6th October 1789 were forced back to Paris from Versailles by a mob of market women.
sentence_translated: Hirmunud kuningas Louis XVI, kuninganna Marie Antoinette, nende kaks noort last (11-aastane Marie Therese ja 4-aastane Louis-Charles) ning kuninga õde, proua Elizabeth, sunniti 6. oktoobril 1789 turu naiste rahutuste tõttu Versailles'ist Pariisi tagasi minema.

sentence: In a carriage, they traveled back to Paris surrounded by a mob of people screaming and shouting threats against the King and Queen.
sentence_translated: Vankris reisisid nad tagasi Pariisi, ümbritsetuna rahvahulgast, kes karjus ja hüüdis kuninga ja kuninganna vastu ähvardusi.

sentence: The mob of people forced the King And Queen to have their carriage windows wide open.
sentence_translated: Rahvamass sundis kuningat ja kuningannat oma vankri aknad lahti hoidma.

sentence: At one point a member of the mob waved the head of a royal guard killed at Versailles in front of the terrified Queen.
sentence_translated: Ühel hetkel lehvitas rahutuste liige Versailles'is tapetud kuningliku kaardi pead hirmunud kuninga ees.

sentence: The war expenditures of U.S. imperialism in the conquest of the Philippines were paid for by the Filipino people themselves.
sentence_translated: Ameerika imperialismi sõjaväe kulutused Filipiinide vallutamisel maksid kinni Filipiinide inimesed ise.

sentence: They were compelled to pay taxes to the U.S. colonial regime to defray a major part of the expenditures and the interest on bonds floated in the name of the Philippine government through the Wall Street banking houses.
sentence_translated: Nad olid sunnitud maksma makse USA koloniaalrežiimile, et katta suurem osa kulutustest ja intressidest, mis olid väljastatud Filipiinide valitsuse nimel Wall Streeti pangamajade kaudu.

sentence: Of course, the superprofits derived from the protracted exploitation of the Filipino people would constitute the basic gains of U.S. imperialism.
sentence_translated: Muidugi, Filipiini rahva pikaajalise ekspluateerimisega saadud ülisuurkasumid moodustaksid Ameerika Ühendriikide imperialismi põhikasumid.

sentence: To understand the Templars one must understand the context that prompted the creation of the order.
sentence_translated: Templarite mõistmiseks tuleb mõista konteksti, mis tõi kaasa ordeni loomise.

sentence: The age where the events took place is commonly referred as the High Middle Ages the period of European history in the 11th, 12th, and 13th centuries (AD 1000–1300).
sentence_translated: Aeg, mil sündmused toimusid, tuntakse tavaliselt kui Kõrge Keskaja, Euroopa ajaloo periood 11., 12. ja 13. sajandil (AD 1000–1300).

sentence: The High Middle Ages were preceded by the Early Middle Ages and followed by the Late Middle Ages, which by convention ends around 1500.
sentence_translated: Kõrge keskaja eelõhtul olid varakeskaja ja järgnes hilisekeskaja, mis konventsioonide kohaselt lõpeb umbes 1500. aastal.

sentence: Technological determinism is a term that encompasses a wide range of ideas in practice, from technology-push or the technological imperative to a strict sense that human destiny is driven by an underlying logic associated with scientific laws and their manifestation in technology.
sentence_translated: Tehnoloogiline determinism on mõiste, mis hõlmab praktikas laia valikut ideid, alates tehnoloogia surve või tehnoloogilisest imperatiivi mõistest kuni rangema tähenduseni, et inimsaatus on juhitud teaduslike seaduste ja nende väljendumise tehnoloogiasse seotud aluspõhjusega.

sentence: Most interpretations of technological determinism share two general ideas: that the development of technology itself follows a path largely beyond cultural or political influence, and that technology in turn has "effects" on societies that are inherent, rather than socially conditioned.
sentence_translated: Enamik tehnoloogilise determinismi tõlgendusi jagab kahte üldist mõtet: et tehnoloogia arengu tee järgib suures osas kultuurilisest või poliitilisest mõjust sõltumatut rada ning et tehnoloogial on omakorda ühiskondadele "mõjud", mis on sisemised, mitte sotsiaalselt tingitud.

sentence: For example, one might say that the motor car necessarily leads to the development of roads.
sentence_translated: Näiteks võiks öelda, et mootorsõiduk viib paratamatult teede arendamiseni.

sentence: However, a nationwide road network is not economically viable for just a handful of cars, so new methods of production are developed to reduce the cost of car ownership.
sentence_translated: Kuid riiklik teedevõrk ei ole majanduslikult tasuv vaid mõne auto jaoks, seetõttu arendatakse uusi tootmisviise, et vähendada auto omamise kulusid.

sentence: Mass car ownership also leads to a higher incidence of accidents on the roads, which leads to the invention of new techniques in healthcare for repairing damaged bodies.
sentence_translated: Massiline autode omamine toob kaasa ka suurema õnnetuste arvu teedel, mis viib uute tehnikate leiutamiseni tervishoius kahjustatud kehade parandamiseks.

sentence: Romanticism had a large element of cultural determinism, drawn from writers such as Goethe, Fichte, and Schlegel.
sentence_translated: Romantismil oli suur kultuurilise determinismi element, mis oli inspireeritud sellistest kirjanikest nagu Goethe, Fichte ja Schlegel.

sentence: In the context of Romanticism, the geography molded individuals, and over time customs and culture related to that geography arose, and these, being in harmony with the place of the society, were better than arbitrarily imposed laws.
sentence_translated: Romantismi kontekstis kujundas geograafia indiviide ja aja jooksul tekkisid selle geograafiaga seotud kombed ja kultuur, mis, olles kooskõlas ühiskonna kohaga, olid paremad kui meelevaldselt kehtestatud seadused.

sentence: In the manner that Paris is known as the fashion capital of the contemporary world, Constantinople was regarded as the fashion capital of feudal Europe.
sentence_translated: Nii nagu Pariisi tuntakse kaasaegse maailma moepealinnana, peeti Konstantinoopolit feodaalse Euroopa moepealinnaks.

sentence: Its renown for being an epicenter of luxury began in about 400 A.D. and lasted up until about 1100 A.D.
sentence_translated: Selle kuulsus luksuse epitsentrina algas umbes 400 pKr ja kestis kuni umbes 1100 pKr.

sentence: Its status declined during the twelfth century mainly due to the fact that Crusaders had returned bearing gifts such as silks and spices that were valued more than what Byzantine markets offered.
sentence_translated: Selle staatus langes kaheteistkümnendal sajandil peamiselt seetõttu, et ristisõdijad naasid kingitustega, nagu siid ja vürtsid, mis olid rohkem hinnatud kui see, mida Bütsantsi turud pakkusid.

sentence: It was at this time that the transfer of the title of Fashion Capital from Constantinople to Paris was made.
sentence_translated: Just sel ajal toimus moepealinna tiitli üleminek Konstantinoopolist Pariisi.

sentence: Gothic style peaked in the period between the 10th - 11th centuries and the 14th century.
sentence_translated: Gooti stiil saavutas haripunkti 10. - 11. sajandi ja 14. sajandi vahel.

sentence: At the beginning dress was heavily influenced by the Byzantine culture in the east.
sentence_translated: Alguses oli riietus tugevalt mõjutatud idas asuvast Bütsantsi kultuurist.

sentence: However, due to the slow communication channels, styles in the west could lag behind by 25 to 30 year.
sentence_translated: Kuid aeglaste suhtluskanalite tõttu võivad lääne stiilid maha jääda 25 kuni 30 aastat.

sentence: towards the end of the Middle Ages western Europe began to develop their own style. one of the biggest developments of the time as a result of the crusades people began to use buttons to fasten clothing.
sentence_translated: Keskaegade lõpus hakkas Lääne-Euroopa arendama oma stiili. Üks suurimaid arenguid sellel ajal oli ristisõdade tulemusena see, et inimesed hakkasid kasutama nuppe riiete kinnitamiseks.

sentence: Subsistence agriculture is agriculture carried out for the production of enough food to meet just the needs of the agriculturalist and his/her family.
sentence_translated: Elatuspõllumajandus on põllumajandus, mida tehakse piisava toidu tootmiseks, et rahuldada ainult põllumajandustootja ja tema pere vajadusi.

sentence: Subsistence agriculture is a simple, often organic, system using saved seed native to the ecoregion combined with crop rotation or other relatively simple techniques to maximize yield.
sentence_translated: Elatusmaandus on lihtne, sageli orgaaniline süsteem, mis kasutab ökosüsteemile iseloomulikke säästetud seemneid koos saagikoristuse vahetamise või muude suhteliselt lihtsate tehnikatega saagikuse maksimeerimiseks.

sentence: Historically most farmers were engaged in subsistence agriculture and this is still the case in many developing nations.
sentence_translated: Ajalooliselt tegeles enamik põllumajandustootjatest elatise põllumajandusega ja see on endiselt nii paljudes arengumaades.

sentence: Subcultures bring together like-minded individuals who feel neglected by societal standards and allow them to develop a sense of identity.
sentence_translated: Subkultuurid toovad kokku sarnaste mõtteviisidega inimesi, kes tunnevad end ühiskondlike standardite poolt tähelepanuta jäetuna, ja võimaldavad neil arendada oma identiteeditunnet.

sentence: Subcultures can be distinctive because of the age, ethnicity, class, location, and/or gender of the members.
sentence_translated: Subkultuurid võivad olla eristuvad liikmete vanuse, etnilise kuuluvuse, klassi, asukoha ja/või soo tõttu.

sentence: The qualities that determine a subculture as distinct may be linguistic, aesthetic, religious, political, sexual, geographical, or a combination of factors.
sentence_translated: Alateadmise eristavad omadused võivad olla keelelised, esteetilised, usulised, poliitilised, seksuaalsed, geograafilised või nende tegurite kombinatsioon.

sentence: Members of a subculture often signal their membership through a distinctive and symbolic use of style, which includes fashions, mannerisms, and argot.
sentence_translated: Subkultuuri liikmed annavad sageli oma kuuluvusest märku eristuva ja sümboolse stiili kasutamise kaudu, mis hõlmab moe, maneeride ja argoti kasutamist.

sentence: One of the most common methods used to illustrate the importance of socialization is to draw upon the few unfortunate cases of children who were, through neglect, misfortune, or wilful abuse, not socialized by adults while they were growing up.
sentence_translated: Üks levinumaid meetodeid, mida kasutatakse sotsialiseerimise tähtsuse illustreerimiseks, on tugineda mõnele ebaõnnelikule juhtumile lastest, keda täiskasvanud ei sotsialiseerinud kas hooletuse, õnnetuse või tahtliku väärkohtlemise tõttu nende üleskasvamise ajal.

sentence: Such children are called "feral" or wild. Some feral children have been confined by people (usually their own parents); in some cases this child abandonment was due to the parents' rejection of a child's severe intellectual or physical impairment.
sentence_translated: Selliseid lapsi nimetatakse "metsikuteks" või "looduslikeks". Mõned metsikud lapsed on olnud inimeste (tavaliselt oma vanemate) poolt kinni peetud; mõnel juhul oli see lapse hülgamine tingitud vanemate lapse tõsise vaimse või füüsilise puudega toimetuleku tagasilükkamisest.

sentence: Feral children may have experienced severe child abuse or trauma before being abandoned or running away.
sentence_translated: Looduslikud lapsed võivad olla kogenud tõsist laste väärkohtlemist või traumat enne, kui nad hüljati või põgenesid.

sentence: Others are alleged to have been brought up by animals; some are said to have lived in the wild on their own.
sentence_translated: Teiste kohta väidetakse, et nad on kasvanud loomade poolt; mõned väidetakse, et nad on elanud metsikus looduses üksi.

sentence: When completely brought up by non-human animals, the feral child exhibits behaviors (within physical limits) almost entirely like those of the particular care-animal, such as its fear of or indifference to humans.
sentence_translated: Kui metsik laps on täielikult üles kasvatatud mitte-inimloomade poolt, näitab ta käitumist (füüsiliste piiride raames), mis on peaaegu täielikult sarnane konkreetse hooldava loomaga, näiteks tema hirm inimeste ees või ükskõiksus inimeste suhtes.

sentence: While project based learning should make learning easier and more interesting, scaffolding goes a step beyond.
sentence_translated: Kuigi projektipõhine õpe peaks õppimise lihtsamaks ja huvitavamaks muutma, läheb toetav õpe sammu edasi.

sentence: Scaffolding is not a method of learning but rather an aid that provides support to individuals whom are undergoing a new learning experience such as using a new computer program or beginning a new project.
sentence_translated: Konstruktsioon ei ole õppimise meetod, vaid pigem abivahend, mis toetab inimesi, kes läbivad uut õpikogemust, näiteks uue arvutiprogrammi kasutamist või uue projekti alustamist.

sentence: Scaffolds can be both virtual and real, in other words, a teacher is a form of scaffold but so is the little paperclip man in Microsoft Office.
sentence_translated: Kohandused võivad olla nii virtuaalsed kui ka reaalsed, teisisõnu, õpetaja on kohanduse vorm, aga samuti on see ka väike paberiklamber mees Microsoft Office'is.

sentence: Virtual Scaffolds are internalized in the software and are meant to question, prompt, and explain procedures that may have been to challenging for the student to handle alone.
sentence_translated: Virtuaalsed toestused on tarkvaras sisalduvad ja on mõeldud küsimiseks, suunamiseks ja selgitamiseks protseduuride osas, mis võivad olla üliõpilasele liiga keerulised, et neid üksi käsitleda.

sentence: Children are placed in Foster Care for a wide variety of reasons that range from neglect, to abuse, and even to extortion.
sentence_translated: Lapsed paigutatakse hooldushooldusse väga erinevatel põhjustel, mis ulatuvad hooletusse jätmisest, väärkohtlemisest ja isegi väljapressimisest.

sentence: No child should ever have to grow up in an environment that is not nurturing, caring, and educational, but they do.
sentence_translated: Ükski laps ei tohiks kunagi kasvada keskkonnas, mis ei ole toetav, hooliv ja hariv, kuid nad kasvavad.

sentence: We perceive the Foster Care System to be a safety zone for these children.
sentence_translated: Me tajume lastehoiuteenust nende laste jaoks turvalise alana.

sentence: Our foster care system is supposed to provide safe homes, loving caregivers, stable education, and reliable health care.
sentence_translated: Meie hoolekandesüsteem peaks pakkuma turvalisi kodusid, armastavaid hooldajaid, stabiilset haridust ja usaldusväärset tervishoidu.

sentence: Foster care is supposed to provide all the necessities that were lacking in the home they were previously taken from.
sentence_translated: Vaatamata sellele, et peres hooldamine peaks pakkuma kõiki vajalikke asju, mida ei olnud kodus, kust nad eelnevalt viidi.

sentence: The Internet combines elements of both mass and interpersonal communication.
sentence_translated: Internet ühendab massi- ja isiklike suhtluse elemente.

sentence: The distinct characteristics of the Internet lead to additional dimensions in terms of the uses and gratifications approach.
sentence_translated: Interneti eripära toob kaasa täiendavad mõõtmed kasutus- ja rahuloluteooria kontekstis.

sentence: For example, “learning” and “socialization” are suggested as important motivations for Internet use (James et al., 1995).
sentence_translated: Näiteks on "õppimine" ja "sotsialiseerumine" soovitatud kui olulised motiivid Interneti kasutamiseks (James jt, 1995).

sentence: “Personal involvement” and “continuing relationships” were also identified as new motivation aspects by Eighmey and McCord (1998) when they investigated audience reactions to websites.
sentence_translated: "Isiklik kaasatus" ja "püsivad suhted" tuvastati ka Eighmey ja McCord (1998) poolt uutena motivatsiooni aspektidena, kui nad uurisid publikureaktsioone veebisaitidele.

sentence: The use of video recording has led to important discoveries in the interpretation of micro-expressions, facial movements which last a few milliseconds.
sentence_translated: Videote salvestamise kasutamine on viinud oluliste avastusteni mikro- jaotuste tõlgendamisel, näo liikumistel, mis kestavad vaid mõned millisekundid.

sentence: In particular, it is claimed that one can detect whether a person is lying by interpreting micro-expressions correctly.
sentence_translated: Eriti väidetakse, et inimene suudab tuvastada, kas keegi valetab, tõlgendades mikroekspressioone õigesti.

sentence: Oliver Sacks, in his paper The President's Speech, indicated how people who are unable to understand speech because of brain damage are nevertheless able to assess sincerity accurately.
sentence_translated: Oliver Sacks oma artiklis "Presidendi kõne" osutas, kuidas inimesed, kes ei suuda ajukahjustuse tõttu kõnet mõista, suudavad siiski täpselt hinnata siirust.

sentence: He even suggests that such abilities in interpreting human behavior may be shared by animals such as domestic dogs.
sentence_translated: Ta isegi ettepanek, et sellised võimed inimkäitumise tõlgendamisel võivad olla jagatud loomadega, nagu kodukoerad.

sentence: Twentieth century research has shown that there are two pools of genetic variation: hidden and expressed.
sentence_translated: Kakskümmend esimeses sajandis tehtud uuringud on näidanud, et olemas on kaks geneetilise varieerumise allikat: peidetud ja väljendunud.

sentence: Mutation adds new genetic variation, and selection removes it from the pool of expressed variation.
sentence_translated: Mutatsioon lisab uusi geneetilisi variatsioone ning valik eemaldab need väljendatud variatsioonide hulgast.

sentence: Segregation and recombination shuffle variation back and forth between the two pools with each generation.
sentence_translated: Segregatsioon ja rekombinatsioon segavad variatsiooni edasi-tagasi kahe basseini vahel iga põlvkonna jooksul.

sentence: Out on the savanna, it is hard for a primate with a digestive system like that of humans to satisfy its amino-acid requirements from available plant resources.
sentence_translated: Savannis on primaatidel, kelle seedesüsteem on sarnane inimeste omale, raske rahuldada oma aminohappe vajadusi saadaval olevatest taimeressurssidest.

sentence: Moreover, failure to do so has serious consequences: growth depression, malnutrition, and ultimately death.
sentence_translated: Lisaks sellele toob selle tegemata jätmine kaasa tõsised tagajärjed: kasvu pidurdumine, alatoitumine ja lõpuks surm.

sentence: The most readily accessible plant resources would have been the proteins accessible in leaves and legumes, but these are hard for primates like us to digest unless they are cooked.
sentence_translated: Kergesti ligipääsetavad taimeressursid oleksid olnud valgud, mis on saadaval lehtedes ja kaunviljades, kuid need on primaatide, nagu meie, jaoks raskesti seeditavad, kui neid ei keedeta.

sentence: In contrast, animal foods (ants, termites, eggs) not only are easily digestible, but they provide high-quantity proteins that contain all the essential amino acids.
sentence_translated: Vastupidi, loomsetest toitudest (ämblikud, termiidid, munad) on mitte ainult kergesti seeditavad, vaid need pakuvad ka suures koguses valke, mis sisaldavad kõiki hädavajalikke aminohappeid.

sentence: All things considered, we should not be surprised if our own ancestors solved their "protein problem" in somewhat the same way that chimps on the savanna do today.
sentence_translated: Kokkuvõttes ei peaks meid üllatama, kui meie esivanemad lahendasid oma "valgu probleemi" mõnevõrra samamoodi nagu šimpansid savannil teevad tänapäeval.

sentence: Sleep interruption is the process of purposefully awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later (10–60 minutes).
sentence_translated: Une katkestamine on protsess, kus ärgatakse meelega normaalsest uneperioodist ja magatakse uuesti lühikese aja pärast (10–60 minutit).

sentence: This can be easily done by using a relatively quiet alarm clock to bring you to consciousness without fully waking you.
sentence_translated: Seda saab hõlpsasti teha, kasutades suhteliselt vaikset äratuskella, et tuua teid teadvusele ilma teid täielikult üles äratamata.

sentence: If you find yourself resetting the clock in your sleep, it can be placed on the other side of the room, forcing you to get out of bed to turn it off.
sentence_translated: Kui leiad end unes kella tagasi seadmas, võid selle panna toa teisele poole, sundides sind voodist välja minema, et see välja lülitada.

sentence: Other biorhythm-based options involve drinking lots of fluid (particularly water or tea, a known diuretic) prior to sleep, forcing one to get up to urinate.
sentence_translated: Teised biorütmipõhised valikud hõlmavad enne und suure hulga vedelike (eriti vee või tee, tuntud diureetikum) joomist, sundides inimest üles tõusma, et urineerida.

sentence: The amount of inner peace a person possesses correlates oppositely to the amount of tension in one’s body and spirit.
sentence_translated: Inimese sisemise rahu hulk on vastupidine tema keha ja vaimu pingete hulgale.

sentence: The lower the tension, the more positive the life force present. Every person has the potential to find absolute peace and contentment.
sentence_translated: Mida madalam on pinge, seda positiivsem on eluenergia. Igal inimesel on potentsiaal leida absoluutne rahu ja rahulolu.

sentence: Everyone can achieve enlightenment. The only thing standing in the way of this goal is our own tension and negativity.
sentence_translated: Igaüks võib saavutada valgustatuse. Ainuke asi, mis selle eesmärgi saavutamise teel seisab, on meie enda pinged ja negatiivsused.

sentence: The Tibetan Buddhism is based on the teachings of Buddha, but were extended by the mahayana path of love and by a lot of techniques from Indian Yoga.
sentence_translated: Tiibeti budism põhineb Buddhi õpetustel, kuid seda on laiendatud mahajana armastuse teega ja paljude India jooga tehnikatega.

sentence: In principle the Tibetan Buddhism is very simple. It consists of Kundalini Yoga, meditation and the path of all-embracing love.
sentence_translated: Põhimõtteliselt on tiibeti budism väga lihtne. See koosneb kundalini joogast, meditatsioonist ja kõikehõlmava armastuse teest.

sentence: With Kundalini Yoga the Kundalini energy (enlightenment energy) is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.
sentence_translated: Kundalini jooga abil äratatakse kundalini energia (valgustumise energia) jooga pooside, hingamisharjutuste, mantrate ja visualiseerimiste kaudu.

sentence: The center of Tibetan meditation is the Deity Yoga. Through the visualization of various deities the energy channels are cleaned, the chakras are activated and the enlightenment consciousness is created.
sentence_translated: Tibeti meditatsiooni keskmes on Deemonite Jooga. Erinevate deemonite visualiseerimise kaudu puhastatakse energia kanalid, aktiveeritakse tšakrad ja luuakse valgustatuse teadvus.

sentence: Germany was a common enemy in World War 2, leading to cooperation between the USSR and USA. With the end of the war the clashes of system, process and culture led to the countries falling out.
sentence_translated: Saksamaa oli Teises maailmasõjas ühine vaenlane, mis viis Nõukogude Liidu ja USA koostööni. Sõja lõppedes viis süsteemide, protsesside ja kultuuri kokkupõrge riikide vaenulikkuseni.

sentence: With two years of the end of the war, the former allies were now enemies and the Cold War began.
sentence_translated: Kaks aastat pärast sõja lõppu olid endised liitlased nüüd vaenlased ja algas külm sõda.

sentence: It was to last for the next 40 years and would be fought for real, by proxy armies, on battlefields from Africa to Asia, in Afghanistan, Cuba and many other places.
sentence_translated: See pidi kestma järgmised 40 aastat ja seda võideldi tõeliselt, vahendajate armeede kaudu, lahinguväljadest Aafrikast Aasiani, Afganistanis, Kuubal ja paljudes teistes kohtades.

sentence: By September 17, 1939, the Polish defense was already broken, and the only hope was to retreat and reorganise along the Romanian bridgehead.
sentence_translated: Kuni 17. septembrini 1939 oli Poola kaitse juba murdunud ja ainus lootus oli taganeda ja reorganiseerida end Rumeenia sildumise ääres.

sentence: However, these plans were rendered obsolete nearly overnight, when over 800,000 soldiers from the Soviet's Union Red Army entered and created the Belarussian and Ukrainian fronts after invading the eastern regions of Poland in violation of the Riga Peace Treaty, the Soviet-Polish Non-Aggression Pact, and other international treaties, both bilateral and multilateral.
sentence_translated: Kuid need plaanid muutusid praktiliselt öösel vananenuks, kui üle 800 000 sõduri Nõukogude Liidu Punasest Armee'st sisenes ja lõi Valgevene ja Ukraina rinded, tungides Poola idapiirkondadesse, rikkudes Riia rahulepingut, Nõukogude-Poola mitteagressioonilepingut ja teisi rahvusvahelisi lepinguid, nii kahepoolseid kui ka mitmepoolseid.

sentence: Using ships to transport goods is by far the most efficient way to move large amounts of people and goods across oceans.
sentence_translated: Laevade kasutamine kaubanduseks on kaugelt kõige tõhusam viis viia suuri koguseid inimesi ja kaupu üle ookeanide.

sentence: The job of navies has traditionally been to ensure that your country maintains the ability to move your people and goods, while at the same time, interfering with your enemy's ability to move his people and goods.
sentence_translated: Mereteenistuste ülesanne on traditsiooniliselt olnud tagada, et teie riik säilitab võime liikuda oma inimesi ja kaupu, samal ajal segades teie vaenlase võimet liikuda tema inimesi ja kaupu.

sentence: One of the most noteworthy recent examples of this was the North Atlantic campaign of WWII. The Americans were trying to move men and materials across the Atlantic Ocean to help Britain.
sentence_translated: Üks tähelepanuväärsemaid hiljutisi näiteid sellest oli Teise maailmasõja Põhja-Atlandi kampaania. Ameeriklased üritasid viia mehi ja materjale üle Atlandi ookeani, et aidata Suurbritanniat.

sentence: At the same time, the German navy, using mainly U-boats, was trying to stop this traffic.
sentence_translated: Samas püüdis Saksamaa merevägi, kasutades peamiselt allveelaevu, seda liiklust peatada.

sentence: Had the Allies failed, Germany probably would have been able to conquer Britain as it had the rest of Europe.
sentence_translated: Kui liitlased oleksid ebaõnnestunud, oleks Saksamaa tõenäoliselt suutnud vallutada Briti, nagu ta oli teinud ülejäänud Euroopaga.

sentence: Goats seem to have been first domesticated roughly 10,000 years ago in the Zagros Mountains of Iran.
sentence_translated: Lambad näivad olevat esmakordselt kodustatud umbes 10 000 aastat tagasi Iraani Zagros mägedes.

sentence: Ancient cultures and tribes began to keep them for easy access to milk, hair, meat, and skins.
sentence_translated: Vana kultuurid ja hõimud hakkasid neid hoidma, et oleks lihtne juurde pääseda piimale, karvale, lihale ja nahale.

sentence: Domestic goats were generally kept in herds that wandered on hills or other grazing areas, often tended by goatherds who were frequently children or adolescents, similar to the more widely known shepherd. These methods of herding are still used today.
sentence_translated: Kodulambaid peeti üldiselt karjades, mis rändasid mägedes või muudes karjamaades, sageli hooldati neid kitsede poolt, kes olid sageli lapsed või noorukid, sarnaselt laiemalt tuntud lambakarjastele. Need karjatamismeetodid on endiselt kasutusel ka täna.

sentence: Wagonways were built in England as early as the 16th Century.
sentence_translated: Vagunite teed ehitati Inglismaal juba 16. sajandil.

sentence: Although wagonways merely consisted of parallel planks of wood, they allowed horses pulling them to achieve greater speeds and pull larger loads than on the slightly more rough roads of the day.
sentence_translated: Kuigi vaguniteed koosnesid vaid paralleelsetest puidust laudistest, võimaldasid need hobustel, kes neid vedasid, saavutada suuremaid kiirus ja vedada suuremaid koormaid kui tol ajal veidi karedamatel teedel.

sentence: Crossties were introduced fairly early to hold the tracks in place. Gradually, however, it was realised that tracks would be more efficient if they had a stip of iron on the top.
sentence_translated: Rööpad tutvustati üsna varakult, et hoida neid paigal. Aja jooksul mõisteti siiski, et rööpad oleksid tõhusamad, kui nende peal oleks rauast ribad.

sentence: This became common practice, but the iron caused more wear on the wooden wheels of the wagons.
sentence_translated: See sai tavaliseks praktikaks, kuid raud põhjustas rohkem kulumist vankrite puidust ratastel.

sentence: Eventually, wooden wheels were replaced by iron wheels. In 1767, the first full-iron rails were introduced.
sentence_translated: Lõpuks asendati puust rattad rauast ratastega. 1767. aastal kasutusele võetud esimesed täisraua rööpad.

sentence: The first known transportation was walking, humans began walking upright two million years ago with the emergence of Homo Erectus (meaning upright man).
sentence_translated: Esimene tuntud transpordivahend oli kõndimine, inimesed hakkasid kaks miljonit aastat tagasi Homo Erectuse (mõistes sirge inimese) ilmumisega sirgelt kõndima.

sentence: Their predecessors, the Australopithecus did not walk upright as habitually.
sentence_translated: Nende eelkäijad, australopiteekid, ei käinud harilikult püsti.

sentence: Bipedal specializations are found in Australopithecus fossils from 4.2-3.9 million years ago, although Sahelanthropus may have walked on two legs as early as seven million years ago.
sentence_translated: Kaksjalgsed spetsialiseerumised on leitud Australopithecuse fossiilidest, mis on vanuses 4,2–3,9 miljonit aastat tagasi, kuigi Sahelanthropus võis käia kahel jalal juba seitse miljonit aastat tagasi.

sentence: We can start living more friendly to the environment, we can join to the environmental movement, and we can even be activists in order to reduce the future suffering in some degree.
sentence_translated: Saame hakata elama loodusele sõbralikumalt, liituda keskkonnaliikumisega ja isegi olla aktivistid, et vähendada tulevikus kannatusi mingil määral.

sentence: This is just like symptomatic treatment in many cases. However, if we do not only want a temporary solution, then we should find the root of the problems, and we should deactivate them.
sentence_translated: See on paljuski sarnane sümptomaatilise raviga. Kuid kui me ei soovi ainult ajutist lahendust, siis peaksime leidma probleemide juured ja need deaktiveerima.

sentence: It is obvious enough that the world has changed much because of humankind's scientific and technological advancements, and problems have become greater because of overpopulation and mankind's extravagant lifestyle.
sentence_translated: On piisavalt selge, et maailm on inimkonna teaduslike ja tehnoloogiliste edusammude tõttu palju muutunud ning probleemid on suurenenud ülerahvastatuse ja inimkonna luksusliku elustiili tõttu.

sentence: After its adoption by Congress on July 4, a handwritten draft signed by the President of Congress John Hancock and the Secretary Charles Thomson was then sent a few blocks away to the printing shop of John Dunlap.
sentence_translated: Pärast selle vastuvõtmist Kongressis 4. juulil saadeti käsitsi kirjutatud mustand, mille oli allkirjastanud Kongressi president John Hancock ja sekretär Charles Thomson, seejärel paar plokki eemal asuvasse trükikotta, mille omanik oli John Dunlap.

sentence: Through the night between 150 and 200 copies were made, now known as "Dunlap broadsides".
sentence_translated: Öö jooksul tehti 150 ja 200 koopiat, mida tuntakse nüüd kui "Dunlap'i broadsid".

sentence: The first public reading of the document was by John Nixon in the yard of Independence Hall on July 8.
sentence_translated: Esimese avaliku lugemise dokumenti tegi John Nixon Iseseisvuse Halli õues 8. juulil.

sentence: One was sent to George Washington on July 6, who had it read to his troops in New York on July 9. A copy reached London on August 10.
sentence_translated: Üks saadeti George Washingtonile 6. juulil, kes laskis selle oma vägedele New Yorgis ette lugeda 9. juulil. Koopia jõudis Londonisse 10. augustil.

sentence: The 25 Dunlap broadsides still known to exist are the oldest surviving copies of the document. The original handwritten copy has not survived.
sentence_translated: 25 Dunlapi broadsidid, mis on endiselt teadaolevalt olemas, on dokumendi vanimad säilinud koopiad. Algne käsitsi kirjutatud koopia ei ole säilinud.

sentence: Many paleontologists today believe that one group of dinosaurs survived and is alive today. We call them birds.
sentence_translated: Paljud paleontoloogid usuvad tänapäeval, et üks dinosauruste rühm on ellu jäänud ja on tänapäeval elus. Me nimetame neid lindudeks.

sentence: Many people don't think about them as dinosaurs because they have feathers and can fly.
sentence_translated: Paljud inimesed ei mõtle neile kui dinosaurustele, kuna neil on suled ja nad oskavad lennata.

sentence: But there are a lot of things about birds that still look like a dinosaur.
sentence_translated: Aga on palju asju lindude juures, mis näevad endiselt välja nagu dinosaurused.

sentence: They have feet with scales and claws, they lay eggs, and they walk on their two back legs like a T-Rex.
sentence_translated: Neil on soomustega jalad ja küünised, nad munevad mune ning nad kõnnivad nagu T-Rex oma kahe tagajala peal.

sentence: Virtually all computers in use today are based on the manipulation of information which is coded in the form of binary numbers.
sentence_translated: Peaaegu kõik tänapäeval kasutatavad arvutid põhinevad teabe töötlemisel, mis on kodeeritud binaarsete numbrite kujul.

sentence: A binary number can have only one of two values, i.e. 0 or 1, and these numbers are referred to as binary digits - or bits, to use computer jargon.
sentence_translated: Binaarsel numbril võib olla ainult üks kahest väärtusest, st 0 või 1, ja neid numbreid nimetatakse binaarseteks numbriteks - või bittideks, kasutades arvutitehnikat.

sentence: Internal poisoning may not be immediately apparent. Symptoms, such as vomiting are sufficiently general that an immediate diagnosis cannot be made.
sentence_translated: Sisemine mürgistus ei pruugi olla kohe ilmne. Sümtomid, nagu oksendamine, on piisavalt üldised, et kohest diagnoosi ei saa panna.

sentence: The best indication of internal poisoning may be the presence of an open container of medication or toxic household chemicals.
sentence_translated: Parim märk sisemürgitusest võib olla avatud ravimite või toksiliste kodukeemiate konteineri olemasolu.

sentence: Check the label for specific first aid instructions for that specific poison.
sentence_translated: Kontrollige sildi pealt konkreetseid esmaabi juhiseid selle konkreetse mürgi jaoks.

sentence: The term bug is used by entomologists in a formal sense for this group of insects.
sentence_translated: Mõistet "putukas" kasutavad entomoloogid ametlikus tähenduses selle putukate rühma jaoks.

sentence: This term derives from ancient familiarity with Bed-bugs, which are insects highly adapted to parasitize humans.
sentence_translated: See termin tuleneb iidsetest teadmistest voodipealsete kohta, kes on putukad, mis on suurepäraselt kohandunud inimeste parasiitideks.

sentence: Both Assassin-bugs and Bed-bugs are nidicolous, adapted to living in nest or housing of their host.
sentence_translated: Nii mõrvar-putukad kui ka voodipesu-putukad on nidikoolilised, kohandatud elama oma peremehe pesas või elamises.

sentence: Across the United States of America, there are approximately 400,000 known cases of Multiple Sclerosis (MS), leaving it as the leading neurological disease in younger and middle aged adults.
sentence_translated: Ameerika Ühendriikides on ligikaudu 400 000 teadaolevat juhtumit sclerosis multiplex'i (MS), muutes selle noorte ja keskealiste täiskasvanute seas juhtivaks neuroloogiliseks haiguseks.

sentence: MS is a disease that affects the central nervous system, which is made up of the brain, the spinal cord and the optic nerve.
sentence_translated: MS on haigus, mis mõjutab kesknärvisüsteemi, mis koosneb ajust, seljaajust ja nägemisnervist.

sentence: Research has found that females are two times more likely to have MS then males.
sentence_translated: Uuringud on leidnud, et naistel on MS-i diagnoosimise tõenäosus kaks korda suurem kui meestel.

sentence: A couple may decide it is not in their best interest, or in the interest of their child, to raise a baby.
sentence_translated: Paari jaoks võib osutuda, et ei ole nende ega nende lapse huvides beebi kasvatamine.

sentence: These couples may choose to make an adoption plan for their baby.
sentence_translated: Need paarid võivad otsustada koostada oma beebi jaoks adopteerimise plaani.

sentence: In an adoption, the birth parents terminate their parental rights so that another couple may parent the child.
sentence_translated: Adopteerimise korral lõpetavad bioloogilised vanemad oma vanemlikud õigused, et teine paar saaks last kasvatada.

sentence: Science’s main goal is to figure out the way the world works through the scientific method. This method in fact guides most scientific research.
sentence_translated: Teaduse peamine eesmärk on välja selgitada, kuidas maailm toimib teadusliku meetodi kaudu. See meetod juhib tegelikult enamikku teadusuuringutest.

sentence: It isn’t alone though, experimentation, and an experiment is a test that is used to eliminate one or more of the possible hypotheses, asking questions, and making observations also guide scientific research.
sentence_translated: Kuid see ei ole üksi, eksperiment ja eksperiment on test, mida kasutatakse ühe või mitme võimaliku hüpoteesi kõrvaldamiseks, küsimuste esitamine ja tähelepanekute tegemine juhivad samuti teaduslikku uurimistööd.

sentence: Naturalists and philosophers focused on classical texts and, in particular, on the Bible in Latin.
sentence_translated: Loodusteadlased ja filosoofid keskendusid klassikalistele tekstidele ja eelkõige Piiblile ladina keeles.

sentence: Accepted were Aristotle's views on all matters of science, including psychology.
sentence_translated: Aristoteli arvamused kõigis teaduse valdkondades, sealhulgas psühholoogias, olid aktsepteeritud.

sentence: As knowledge of Greek declined, the West found itself cut off from its Greek philosophical and scientific roots.
sentence_translated: Kuna teadmised kreeka keelest vähenesid, leidis Lääs end oma kreeka filosoofilistest ja teaduslikest juurtest eraldatuna.

sentence: Many observed rhythms in physiology and behavior often crucially depend on the presence of endogenous cycles and their production through biological clocks.
sentence_translated: Paljusid füsioloogia ja käitumise rütme jälgitakse ning need sõltuvad sageli oluliselt endogeensetest tsüklitest ja nende tootmisest bioloogiliste kellade kaudu.

sentence: Periodic rhythms, which are not simply responses to external periodic cues, have been documented for most living beings, including bacteria, fungi, plants, and animals.
sentence_translated: Perioodilised rütmid, mis ei ole lihtsalt reaktsioonid välistele perioodilistele signaalidele, on dokumenteeritud enamikule elusolenditele, sealhulgas bakteritele, seentele, taimedele ja loomadele.

sentence: Biological clocks are self sustaining oscillators which will continue a period of free-running cycling even in the absence of external cues.
sentence_translated: Bioloogilised kellad on iseseisvad osillaatorid, mis jätkavad vabalt kulgevate tsüklite perioodi isegi siis, kui väliseid signaale ei ole.

sentence: The Hershey and Chase experiment was one of the leading suggestions that DNA was a genetic material.
sentence_translated: Hershey ja Chase'i eksperiment oli üks peamisi ettepanekuid, et DNA on geneetiline materjal.

sentence: Hershey and Chase used phages, or viruses, to implant their own DNA into a bacterium.
sentence_translated: Hershey ja Chase kasutasid faage ehk viiruseid, et implanteerida oma DNA bakterisse.

sentence: They did two experiments marking either the DNA in the phage with a radioactive phosphorus or the protein of the phage with radioactive sulfur.
sentence_translated: Nad tegid kaks katset, märkides kas faagi DNA radioaktiivse fosforiga või faagi valgu radioaktiivse väävliga.

sentence: Mutations can have a variety of different effects depending on the type of mutation, the significance of the piece of genetic material affected and whether the cells affected are germ-line cells.
sentence_translated: Mutatsioonidel võivad olla erinevad mõjud, sõltuvalt mutatsiooni tüübist, mõjutatud geneetilise materjali olulisusest ja sellest, kas mõjutatud rakud on sugurakud.

sentence: Only mutations in germ-line cells can be passed on to children, while mutations elsewhere can cause cell-death or cancer.
sentence_translated: Ainult mutatsioonid sugurakkudes võivad edasi kanduda lastele, samas kui mutatsioonid mujal võivad põhjustada rakusurma või vähki.

sentence: Nature-based tourism attracts people interested in visiting natural areas for the purpose of enjoying the scenery, including plant and animal wildlife.
sentence_translated: Looduspõhine turism tõmbab inimesi, kes on huvitatud looduslike alade külastamisest, et nautida maastikku, sealhulgas taimede ja loomade elustikku.

sentence: Examples of on-site activities include hunting, fishing, photography, bird watching, and visiting parks and studying information about the ecosystem.
sentence_translated: Koht tegevuste näidete hulka kuuluvad jahindus, kalapüük, fotograafia, lindude vaatlemine ning parkide külastamine ja ökosüsteemi kohta teabe uurimine.

sentence: An example is visiting, photographing, and learning about organgatuangs in Borneo.
sentence_translated: Näide on orangutange Borneos külastamine, nende fotografeerimine ja nende kohta õppimine.

sentence: Every morning, people leave small country towns in cars to go their workplace and are passed by others whose work destination is the place they have just left.
sentence_translated: Igal hommikul lahkuvad inimesed väikestest maakohtadest autodesse, et minna oma töökohta, ja neid möödub teisi, kelle töösihtkoht on koht, kust nad just lahkusid.

sentence: In this dynamic transport shuttle everyone is somehow connected with, and supporting, a transport system based on private cars.
sentence_translated: Selles dünaamilises transpordishuttis on kõik omamoodi seotud ja toetavad transpordisüsteemi, mis põhineb eraautodel.

sentence: Science now indicates that this massive carbon economy has dislodged the biosphere from one of its stable states that has supported human evolution for the past two million years.
sentence_translated: Teadus näitab nüüd, et see massiivne süsiniku majandus on nihutanud biosfääri ühest selle stabiilsest olekust, mis on toetanud inimeste evolutsiooni viimase kahe miljoni aasta jooksul.

sentence: Everyone participates in society and uses transportation systems. Almost everyone complains about transportation systems.
sentence_translated: Igaüks osaleb ühiskonnas ja kasutab transpordisüsteeme. Peaaegu kõik kurdavad transpordisüsteemide üle.

sentence: In developed countries you seldom hear similar levels of complaints about water quality or bridges falling down.
sentence_translated: Arengumaades kuuleb harva sarnaseid kaebusi vee kvaliteedi või sildade kokkuvarisemise kohta.

sentence: Why do transportation systems engender such complaints, why do they fail on a daily basis? Are transportation engineers just incompetent? Or is something more fundamental going on?
sentence_translated: Miks tekitavad transpordisüsteemid selliseid kaebusi, miks nad ebaõnnestuvad igapäevaselt? Kas transpinsenerid on lihtsalt saamatu? Või on midagi fundamentaalset toimumas?

sentence: Traffic Flow is the study of the movement of individual drivers and vehicles between two points and the interactions they make with one another.
sentence_translated: Liiklusvoog on individuaalsete juhtide ja sõidukite liikumise uurimine kahe punkti vahel ning nendevaheliste interaktsioonide uurimine.

sentence: Unfortunately, studying traffic flow is difficult because driver behavior cannot be predicted with one-hundred percent certainty.
sentence_translated: Kahjuks on liiklusvoo uurimine keeruline, kuna juhikäitumist ei saa sada protsenti kindlalt ennustada.

sentence: Fortunately, drivers tend to behave within a reasonably consistent range; thus, traffic streams tend to have some reasonable consistency and can be roughly represented mathematically.
sentence_translated: Õnneks kipuvad juhid käituma suhteliselt järjepidevas vahemikus; seega kipuvad liiklusvood olema mõistlikult järjepidevad ja neid saab umbkaudselt matemaatiliselt esitada.

sentence: To better represent traffic flow, relationships have been established between the three main characteristics: (1) flow, (2) density, and (3) velocity.
sentence_translated: Liiklusvoo parema esindamise nimel on loodud seosed kolme peamise omaduse vahel: (1) voog, (2) tihedus ja (3) kiirus.

sentence: These relationships help in planning, design, and operations of roadway facilities.
sentence_translated: Need suhted aitavad teede rajatiste planeerimisel, projekteerimisel ja toimimisel.

sentence: Insects were the first animals to take to the air. Their ability to fly helped them evade enemies more easily and find food and mates more efficiently.
sentence_translated: Putukad olid esimesed loomad, kes õhku tõusid. Nende lendamisvõime aitas neil vaenlasi kergemini vältida ning toitu ja kaaslasi tõhusamalt leida.

sentence: Most insects have the advantage of being able to fold their wings back along the body.
sentence_translated: Enamikul putukatel on eelis, et nad suudavad oma tiibu keha äärde kokku voltida.

sentence: This gives them a wider range of small places to hide from predators.
sentence_translated: See annab neile laiemad võimalused väikeste kohtade leidmiseks, kus varjuda kiskjate eest.

sentence: Today, the only insects that cannot fold back their wings are dragon flies and mayflies.
sentence_translated: Täna on ainsad putukad, kes ei suuda oma tiibu tagasi voltida, liblikad ja mayflyd.

sentence: Thousands of years ago, a man called Aristarchus said that the Solar System moved around the Sun.
sentence_translated: Tuhandeid aastaid tagasi ütles mees nimega Aristarchus, et Päikesesüsteem liigub ümber Päikese.

sentence: Some people thought he was right but many people believed the opposite; that the Solar System moved around the Earth, including the Sun (and even the other stars).
sentence_translated: Mõned inimesed arvasid, et ta oli õige, kuid paljud uskusid vastupidist; et Päikesesüsteem liikus Maa ümber, sealhulgas Päike (ja isegi teised tähed).

sentence: This seems sensible, because the Earth doesn't feel as if it's moving, does it?
sentence_translated: See tundub mõistlik, sest Maa ei tunne, et ta liigub, kas pole?

sentence: The Amazon River is the second longest and the biggest river on Earth. It carries more than 8 times as much water as the second biggest river.
sentence_translated: Amazonase jõgi on teine pikim ja suurim jõgi Maal. See kannab rohkem kui 8 korda rohkem vett kui teine suurim jõgi.

sentence: The Amazon is also the widest river on Earth, at times six miles wide.
sentence_translated: Amazoni jõgi on ka laiem jõgi Maal, kohati kuus miili lai.

sentence: A full 20 percent of the water that pours out of the planet's rivers into the oceans comes from the Amazon.
sentence_translated: Kogu 20 protsenti veest, mis voolab planeedi jõgedest ookeanidesse, pärineb Amazonast.

sentence: The main Amazon River is 6,387 km (3,980 miles). It collects water from thousands of smaller rivers.
sentence_translated: Peamine Amazonase jõgi on 6 387 km (3 980 miili). See kogub vett tuhandetelt väiksematelt jõgedelt.

sentence: Although pyramid-building in stone continued until the end of the Old Kingdom, the pyramids of Giza were never surpassed in their size and the technical excellence of their construction.
sentence_translated: Kuigi kivist püramiidide ehitamine jätkus kuni Vana Kuningriigi lõpuni, ei ületanud Giza püramiidid kunagi oma suuruse ja ehituse tehnilise täiuslikkuse poolest.

sentence: New Kingdom ancient Egyptians marvelled at their predecessors monuments, which were then well over a thousand year old.
sentence_translated: Uue kuningriigi iidsetel egiptlastel oli imetlus oma eelkäijate monumentide vastu, mis olid siis juba üle tuhande aasta vanad.

sentence: Vatican City's population is around 800. It is the smallest independent country in the world and the country with the lowest population.
sentence_translated: Vatikani linna rahvaarv on umbes 800. See on maailma väikseim iseseisev riik ja riik, millel on kõige madalam rahvaarv.

sentence: Vatican City uses Italian in its legislation and official communications.
sentence_translated: Vatikani linn kasutab oma seadusandluses ja ametlikes suhtlustes itaalia keelt.

sentence: Italian is also the everyday language used by most of those who work in the state while Latin is often used in religious ceremonies.
sentence_translated: Itaalia keel on samuti igapäevane keel, mida kasutavad enamik riigis töötavatest inimestest, samas kui ladina keelt kasutatakse sageli usutseremooniatel.

sentence: All citizens of Vatican City are Roman Catholic.
sentence_translated: Kõik Vatikani linna kodanikud on rooma katoliiklased.

sentence: People have known about basic chemical elements such as gold, silver, and copper from antiquity, as these can all be discovered in nature in native form and are relatively simple to mine with primitive tools.
sentence_translated: Inimesed on juba antiikajast tuntud põhikeemiliste elementide, nagu kuld, hõbe ja vask, poolest, kuna neid saab loodusest leida looduslikus vormis ning neid on suhteliselt lihtne kaevandada primitiivsete tööriistadega.

sentence: Aristotle, a philosopher, theorised that everything is made up of a mixture of one or more of four elements. They were earth, water, air, and fire.
sentence_translated: Aristoteles, filosoof, teooris, et kõik koosneb ühe või enama neljast elemendist. Need olid maa, vesi, õhk ja tuli.

sentence: This was more like the four states of matter (in the same order): solid, liquid, gas, and plasma, though he also theorised that they change into new substances to form what we see.
sentence_translated: See oli rohkem nagu nelja aine oleku (samas järjekorras): tahke, vedel, gaas ja plasma, kuigi ta teooriseeris, et need muutuvad uuteks aineteks, et moodustada seda, mida me näeme.

sentence: Alloys are basically a mixture of two or more metals. Don't forget that there are many elements on the periodic table.
sentence_translated: Sulamid on põhimõtteliselt kahe või enama metalli segu. Ära unusta, et perioodiliselt tabelis on palju elemente.

sentence: Elements like calcium and potassium are considered metals. Of course, there are also metals like silver and gold.
sentence_translated: Elemente nagu kaltsium ja kaalium peetakse metallideks. Muidugi on olemas ka metalle nagu hõbe ja kuld.

sentence: You can also have alloys that include small amounts of non-metallic elements like carbon.
sentence_translated: Saate ka sulameid, mis sisaldavad väikestes kogustes mitte-metallilisi elemente nagu süsinik.

sentence: Everything in the Universe is made of matter. All matter is made of tiny particles called atoms.
sentence_translated: Kõik Universumis on valmistatud ainest. Kõik aine on valmistatud väikestest osakestest, mida nimetatakse aatomiteks.

sentence: Atoms are so incredibly tiny that trillions of them could fit into the period at the end of this sentence.
sentence_translated: Aatomid on nii uskumatult väikesed, et triljonid neist mahuksid selle lause lõpus oleva punkti sisse.

sentence: Thus, the pencil was a good friend to many people when it came out.
sentence_translated: Seega oli pliiats paljudele inimestele hea sõber, kui see välja tuli.

sentence: Sadly, as newer methods of writing have emerged, the pencil has been relegated to lesser status and uses.
sentence_translated: Kahjuks on uute kirjutamismeetodite ilmumisega pliiats saanud madalama staatuse ja kasutuse.

sentence: People now write messages on computer screens, never having to come close to a sharpener.
sentence_translated: Inimesed kirjutavad nüüd sõnumeid arvutiekraanidele, kunagi ei pea nad teritaja lähedale minema.

sentence: One can only wonder what the keyboard will become when something newer comes along.
sentence_translated: Võib vaid imestada, milleks klaviatuur muutub, kui midagi uuemat tuleb.

sentence: The fission bomb works on the principle that it takes energy to put together a nucleus with many protons and neutrons.
sentence_translated: Fissioonibomb töötab põhimõttel, et tuuma koosseisu, kus on palju proone ja neutrone, kokku panemine nõuab energiat.

sentence: Sort of like rolling a heavy cart up a hill. Splitting the nucleus up again then releases some of that energy.
sentence_translated: Tõeliselt nagu raske vankri veeretamine mäkke. Tuuma taaslahkamine vabastab osa sellest energiast.

sentence: Some atoms have unstable nuclei which means that they tend to break apart with little or no nudging.
sentence_translated: Mõned aatomid omavad ebastabiilseid tuumasid, mis tähendab, et nad kalduvad lagunema väikese või isegi ilma tõuketa.

sentence: The surface of the Moon is made of rocks and dust. The outer layer of the Moon is called the crust.
sentence_translated: Kuu pind on tehtud kivimitest ja tolmust. Kuu välimist kihti nimetatakse koorikuks.

sentence: The crust is about 70 km thick on the near side and 100 km thick on the far side.
sentence_translated: Koor on ligikaudu 70 km paksune lähedasel küljel ja 100 km paksune kaugel küljel.

sentence: It is thinner under the maria and thicker under the highlands.
sentence_translated: See on maria all õhem ja kõrgustiku all paksem.

sentence: There may be more maria on the near side because the crust is thinner. It was easier for lava to rise up to the surface.
sentence_translated: Lähedasel küljel võib olla rohkem maria, kuna koorik on õhem. Lavale oli lihtsam tõusta pinnale.

sentence: Content theories are centered on finding what makes people tick or appeals to them.
sentence_translated: Sisu teooriad keskenduvad sellele, et leida, mis paneb inimesi tegutsema või mis neile meeldib.

sentence: These theories suggest that people have certain needs and/or desires which have been internalized as they mature to adulthood.
sentence_translated: Need teooriad viitavad sellele, et inimestel on teatud vajadused ja/või soovid, mis on küpsemise käigus internaliseeritud täiskasvanuks saades.

sentence: These theories look at what it is about certain people that make them want the things that they do and what things in their environment will make them do or not do certain things.
sentence_translated: Need teooriad uurivad, mis on teatud inimeste juures see, mis paneb neid tahtma asju, mida nad teevad, ja millised asjad nende keskkonnas panevad neid teatud asju tegema või mitte tegema.

sentence: Two popular content theories are Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs Theory and Hertzberg's Two Factor Theory.
sentence_translated: Kaks populaarset sisu teooriat on Maslow' vajaduste hierarhia teooria ja Hertzbergi kahe teguri teooria.

sentence: Generally speaking, two behaviors can emerge as managers begin to lead their former peers. One end of the spectrum is trying to remain “one of the guys” (or gals).
sentence_translated: Üldiselt võib öelda, et kui juhid hakkavad juhtima oma endisi kaaslasi, võivad tekkida kaks käitumisviisi. Üks spektri äär on proovida jääda "üheks meestest" (või naistest).

sentence: This type of manager has difficulty making unpopular decisions, performing disciplinary action, performance evaluations, assigning responsibility, and holding people accountable.
sentence_translated: Selle tüüpi juhil on raske teha ebapopulaarseid otsuseid, rakendada distsiplinaarmeetmeid, hinnata töötulemusi, määrata vastutust ja hoida inimesi vastutavana.

sentence: At the other end of the spectrum, one morphs into an unrecognizable individual that feels he or she must change everything the team has been doing and make it their own.
sentence_translated: Spektri teises otsas muutub inimene tuvastamatuks, tundes, et ta peab muutma kõike, mida meeskond on teinud, ning tegema selle enda omaks.

sentence: After all, the leader is ultimately responsible for the success and failure of the team.
sentence_translated: Lõppude lõpuks vastutab juht lõppkokkuvõttes meeskonna edu ja ebaedu eest.

sentence: This behavior oftentimes results in rifts between the leaders and the rest of the team.
sentence_translated: See käitumine toob tihti kaasa lõhesid juhtide ja ülejäänud meeskonna vahel.

sentence: Virtual teams are held to the same standards of excellence as conventional teams, but there are subtle differences.
sentence_translated: Virtuaalsed meeskonnad peavad vastama samade tipptaseme standarditele nagu tavalised meeskonnad, kuid seal on peeneid erinevusi.

sentence: Virtual team members often function as the point of contact for their immediate physical group.
sentence_translated: Virtuaalsed meeskonnaliikmed toimivad sageli kontaktpunktina oma vahetu füüsilise grupi jaoks.

sentence: They often have more autonomy than conventional team members as their teams may meet according to varying time zones which may not be understood by their local management.
sentence_translated: Neil on sageli rohkem autonoomiat kui tavapärastel meeskonnaliikmetel, kuna nende meeskonnad võivad kohtuda erinevates ajavööndites, mida nende kohalik juhtkond ei pruugi mõista.

sentence: The presence of a true “invisible team” (Larson and LaFasto, 1989, p109) is also a unique component of a virtual team.
sentence_translated: Tõelise "nähtamatu meeskonna" (Larson ja LaFasto, 1989, lk 109) olemasolu on samuti ainulaadne komponent virtuaalses meeskonnas.

sentence: The “invisible team” is the management team to which each of the members report. The invisible team sets the standards for each member.
sentence_translated: "Nähtamatu meeskond" on juhtimismeeskond, kellele iga liige aru annab. Nähtamatu meeskond seab standardid iga liikme jaoks.

sentence: Why would an organization want to go through the time consuming process of establishing a learning organization? One goal for putting organizational learning concepts into practice is innovation.
sentence_translated: Miks peaks organisatsioon soovima läbida aeganõudev protsess õppiva organisatsiooni loomisel? Üks eesmärk organisatsioonilise õppimise kontseptsioonide elluviimisel on innovatsioon.

sentence: When all available resources are effectively used across the functional departments of an organization, creativity and ingenuity can transpire.
sentence_translated: Kui kõik saadaval olevad ressursid on tõhusalt kasutatud organisatsiooni funktsionaalsetes osakondades, võib tekkida loovus ja leidlikkus.

sentence: As a result, the process of an organization working together to overcome an obstacle can lead to a new innovative process to serve the customer's need.
sentence_translated: Tulemuseks on see, et organisatsiooni koostöö takistuste ületamiseks võib viia uue innovaatilise protsessini, et rahuldada kliendi vajadusi.

sentence: Before an organization can be innovative, leadership must create a culture of innovation as well as shared knowledge and organizational learning.
sentence_translated: Enne kui organisatsioon saab olla innovatiivne, peab juhtkond looma innovatsiooni kultuuri ning jagatud teadmiste ja organisatsioonilise õppimise.

sentence: Angel (2006), explains the Continuum approach as a method being used to help organizations reach a higher level of performance.
sentence_translated: Angel (2006) selgitab Continuum lähenemist kui meetodit, mida kasutatakse organisatsioonide abistamiseks kõrgema tulemuslikkuse taseme saavutamisel.

sentence: Neurobiological data provide physical evidence for a theoretical approach to the investigation of cognition. Therefore it narrows the research area and makes it much more exact.
sentence_translated: Neurobioloogilised andmed pakuvad füüsilist tõendit teoreetilise lähenemise kohta kognitsiooni uurimisel. Seetõttu kitsendab see uurimisvaldkonda ja muudab selle palju täpsemaks.

sentence: The correlation between brain pathology and behaviour supports scientists in their research.
sentence_translated: Aju patoloogia ja käitumise vaheline seos toetab teadlasi nende uurimustes.

sentence: It has been known for a long time that different types of brain damage, traumas, lesions, and tumours affect behaviour and cause changes in some mental functions.
sentence_translated: On juba pikka aega teada, et erinevad tüübid ajukahjustusi, traumasid, kahjustusi ja kasvajaid mõjutavad käitumist ja põhjustavad muutusi teatud vaimsetes funktsioonides.

sentence: The rise of new technologies allows us to see and investigate brain structures and processes never seen before.
sentence_translated: Uute tehnoloogiate tõus võimaldab meil näha ja uurida ajustruktuure ja -protsesse, mida pole kunagi varem nähtud.

sentence: This provides us with a lot of information and material to build simulation models which help us to understand processes in our mind.
sentence_translated: See annab meile palju teavet ja materjale simulatsioonimudelite loomiseks, mis aitavad meil mõista protsesse meie mõtlemises.

sentence: Although AI has a strong connotation of science fiction, AI forms a very important branch of computer science, dealing with behavior, learning and intelligent adaptation in a machine.
sentence_translated: Kuigi tehisintellektil on tugev seos ulmežanriga, on tehisintellekt väga oluline arvutiteaduse haru, mis tegeleb käitumise, õppimise ja intelligentse kohandumisega masinas.

sentence: Research in AI involves making machines to automate tasks that require intelligent behavior.
sentence_translated: Tehisintellekti uurimine hõlmab masinate loomist, et automatiseerida ülesandeid, mis nõuavad intelligentset käitumist.

sentence: Examples include control, planning and scheduling, the ability to answer customer diagnoses and questions, as well as handwriting recognition, voice and face.
sentence_translated: Näited hõlmavad kontrolli, planeerimist ja ajakava koostamist, võimet vastata kliendi diagnoosidele ja küsimustele, samuti käekirja tuvastamist, häält ja nägu.

sentence: Such things have become separate disciplines, which focus on providing solutions to real life problems.
sentence_translated: Sellised asjad on muutunud eraldi distsipliinideks, mis keskenduvad lahenduste pakkumisele reaalsetele elu probleemidele.

sentence: The AI ​​system is now often used in the fields of economics, medicine, engineering and the military, as has been built in several home computer and video game software applications.
sentence_translated: Tehisintellekti süsteemi kasutatakse nüüd sageli majanduse, meditsiini, inseneritehnika ja sõjaväe valdkondades, nagu on ehitatud mitmesse koduarvuti ja videomängude tarkvararakendusse.

sentence: Field trips are a large part of any classroom. Quite often a teacher would love to take her students places to which a bus trip is not an option.
sentence_translated: Väljasõidud on suur osa igast klassiruumist. Tihti soovib õpetaja viia oma õpilasi kohtadesse, kuhu bussireis ei ole võimalus.

sentence: Technology offers the solution with virtual field trips. Students can look at museum artifacts, visit an aquarium, or admire beautiful art while sitting with their class.
sentence_translated: Tehnoloogia pakub lahendust virtuaalsete väljasõitude kaudu. Õpilased saavad vaadata muuseumieksponaate, külastada akvaariumi või imetleda kaunist kunsti, istudes oma klassiga.

sentence: Sharing a field trip virtually is also a great way to reflect a on a trip and share experiences with future classes.
sentence_translated: Virtuaalne väljasõit on suurepärane viis reisi üle järele mõelda ja jagada kogemusi tulevaste klassidega.

sentence: For example, each year students from Bennet School in North Carolina design a website about their trip to the State Capital, each year the website gets remodeled, but old versions are kept online to serve as a scrapbook.
sentence_translated: Näiteks iga aasta kujundavad Põhja-Carolina Bennet'i kooli õpilased veebilehe oma reisist osariigi pealinna, iga aasta veebilehte uuendatakse, kuid vanad versioonid hoitakse veebis, et need teeniksid kui album.

sentence: Blogs can also help improve student writing. While students often begin their blog experience with sloppy grammar and spelling, the presence of an audience generally changes that.
sentence_translated: Blogid võivad samuti aidata parandada õpilaste kirjutamisoskust. Kuigi õpilased alustavad sageli oma blogikogemust kehva grammatika ja õigekirjaga, muudab publiku olemasolu tavaliselt seda.

sentence: Since students are often the most critical audience, the blog writer begins to strive to improve writing to avoid criticism.
sentence_translated: Kuna õpilased on sageli kõige kriitilisem publik, püüab blogi autor oma kirjutamist parandada, et vältida kriitikat.
