sentence: Also blogging "forces students to become more savvy about the world around them." The need to feed the interest of the audience inspires students to be clever and interesting (Toto, 2004).
sentence_translated: Samuti sunnib blogimine "õpilasi olema teadlikumad ümbritsevast maailmast." Publiku huvi rahuldamise vajadus inspireerib õpilasi olema nutikad ja huvitavad (Toto, 2004).

sentence: Blogging is a tool that inspires collaboration, and encourages students to extend learning well beyond the traditional school day.
sentence_translated: Blogimine on tööriist, mis inspireerib koostööd ja julgustab õpilasi õppimist laiendama palju kaugemale traditsioonilisest koolipäevast.

sentence: Appropriate use of blogs "can empower students to become more analytical and critical; through actively responding to Internet materials, students can define their positions in the context of others' writings as well as outline their own perspectives on particular issues (Oravec, 2002).
sentence_translated: Blogide sobiv kasutamine "võib anda õpilastele võimaluse muutuda analüüsivamaks ja kriitilisemaks; aktiivse vastamise kaudu Interneti materjalidele suudavad õpilased määratleda oma seisukohad teiste kirjutiste kontekstis ning välja tuua oma vaatenurgad konkreetsetele küsimustele (Oravec, 2002).

sentence: Ottawa is Canada's charming, bilingual capital and features an array of art galleries and museums that showcase Canada's past and present.
sentence_translated: Ottawa on Kanada võluv, kakskeelne pealinn, kus on mitmekesine kunstigalerii ja muuseumid, mis tutvustavad Kanada minevikku ja olevikku.

sentence: Farther south is Niagara Falls and the north is home to the untapped natural beauty of the Muskoka and beyond.
sentence_translated: Lõuna poole asub Niagara juga ja põhjas leidub kasutamata looduskauneid kohti Muskoka piirkonnas ja kaugemal.

sentence: All these things and more highlight Ontario as what is considered quintessentially Canadian by outsiders.
sentence_translated: Kõik need asjad ja veel rohkem rõhutavad Ontario tähtsust kui seda, mida peetakse väljaspool Kanadat tõeliselt kanadalikuks.

sentence: Large areas further north are quite sparsely populated and some is nearly uninhabited wilderness.
sentence_translated: Suured alad põhja pool on üsna hõredalt asustatud ja mõned neist on peaaegu asustamata metsik loodus.

sentence: For a comparison of population that surprises many: There are more African Americans living in the US than there are Canadian citizens.
sentence_translated: Rahvastiku võrdlemiseks, mis üllatab paljusid: Ameerika Ühendriikides elab rohkem afroameeriklasi kui Kanada kodanikke.

sentence: The East African Islands are in the Indian Ocean off the eastern coast of Africa.
sentence_translated: Ida-Aafrika saared asuvad India ookeanis Aafrika idaosas.

sentence: Madagascar is by far the biggest, and a continent on its own when it comes to wildlife.
sentence_translated: Madagaskar on kaugel suurim ja omaette kontinent, kui rääkida looduse mitmekesisusest.

sentence: Most of the smaller islands are independent nations, or associated with France, and known as luxury beach resorts.
sentence_translated: Enamik väiksematest saartest on iseseisvad riigid või seotud Prantsusmaaga ning tuntud luksuslike rannakuurortidena.

sentence: The Arabs also brought Islam to the lands, and it took in a big way in the Comoros and Mayotte.
sentence_translated: Araablased tõid ka islami maadesse ning see levis suurel määral Komooridel ja Mayottel.

sentence: European influence and colonialism began in the 15th century, as Portuguese explorer Vasco da Gama found the Cape Route from Europe to India.
sentence_translated: Euroopa mõju ja koloniaalism algasid 15. sajandil, kui Portugali uurija Vasco da Gama leidis Euroopa ja India vahelise Kapiteeduse marsruudi.

sentence: In the north the region is bounded by the Sahel, and in the south and west by the Atlantic Ocean.
sentence_translated: Põhjas piirneb piirkond Saheli, lõunas ja läänes Atlandi ookeaniga.

sentence: Women: It is recommended that any women travellers say that they are married, regardless of actual marital status.
sentence_translated: Naised: Soovitatav on, et kõik naistravelerid ütleksid, et nad on abielus, olenemata tegelikust abielu seisundist.

sentence: It is helpful to also wear a ring (just not one that looks too expensive.
sentence_translated: On kasulik kanda ka sõrmust (lihtsalt mitte ühte, mis näeb liiga kallis välja).

sentence: Women should realize that cultural differences may result in what they would consider harassment and it is not uncommon to be followed, grabbed by the arm, etc.
sentence_translated: Naised peaksid mõistma, et kultuurilised erinevused võivad viia olukordadeni, mida nad peavad ahistamiseks, ning ei ole haruldane, et neid järgitakse, käest kinni haaratakse jne.

sentence: Be firm in turning down men, and don't be afraid to stand your ground (cultural differences or not, it doesn't make it ok!).
sentence_translated: Ole kindel meeste tagasi lükkamisel ja ära karda seista oma põhimõtete eest (kultuurilised erinevused või mitte, see ei tee seda õigeks!).

sentence: The modern city of Casablanca was founded by Berber fishermen in the 10th century BCE, and was used by the Phoenicians, Romans, and the Merenids as a strategic port called Anfa.
sentence_translated: Kaasaegne Casablanca linn asutati 10. sajandil eKr berberi kalurite poolt ning seda kasutasid strateegilise sadamana foiniiklased, roomlased ja Merenid, nimetades seda Anfaks.

sentence: The Portuguese destroyed it and rebuilt it under the name Casa Branca, only to abandon it after an earthquake in 1755.
sentence_translated: Portugallased hävitasid selle ja ehitasid uuesti üles nimega Casa Branca, et seejärel pärast maavärinat 1755. aastal hüljata.

sentence: The Moroccan sultan rebuilt the city as Daru l-Badya and it was given the name Casablanca by Spanish traders who established trading bases there.
sentence_translated: Maroko sultan ehitas linna uuesti ja nimetas selle Daru l-Badyaks, ning Hispaania kaubanduse rajajad, kes seal kaubanduse aluseid asutasid, andsid sellele nimeks Casablanca.

sentence: Casablanca is one of the least interesting places to shop in all of Morocco.
sentence_translated: Casablanca on üks vähem huvitavaid kohti ostlemiseks kogu Marokos.

sentence: Around the old Medina it's easy to find places selling traditional Moroccan goods, such as tagines, pottery, leather goods, hookahs, and a whole spectrum of geegaws, but it's all for the tourists.
sentence_translated: Vana Medina ümber on lihtne leida kohti, mis müüvad traditsioonilisi maroko kaupu, nagu tagiinid, keraamika, nahktooted, shisha ja terve spekter igasuguseid vidinaid, kuid see kõik on suunatud turistidele.

sentence: Goma is a tourist city of the Democratic Republic of Congo in the extreme east near Rwanda.
sentence_translated: Goma on turismilinn Kongo Demokraatlikus Vabariigis äärmises idas, lähedal Rwandale.

sentence: In 2002 Goma was destroyed by lava from the Nyiragongo volcano which buried most of the town’s streets, particularly the town centre.
sentence_translated: Aastal 2002 hävitas Goma lava Nyiragongo vulkaanist, mis matis enamik linna tänavatest, eriti linna keskuse.

sentence: While Goma is reasonably safe, any visits outside of Goma should be researched to understand the state of the fighting that persists in the North Kivu province.
sentence_translated: Kuigi Goma on suhteliselt ohutu, tuleks uurida kõiki visiite Goma väliselt, et mõista Põhja-Kivus jätkuvaid lahingute seisukordi.

sentence: The city is also the base to climb the Nyiragongo volcano along with some of the cheapest Mountain Gorilla tracking in Africa.
sentence_translated: Linn on samuti baas Nyiragongo vulkaani ronimiseks ning seal on mõned odavaimad mägigorilla jälgimise võimalused Aafrikas.

sentence: You can use boda-boda (motorcycle taxi) to get around Goma. The normal (local) price is ~500 Congolese Francs for the short ride.
sentence_translated: Gomas ringi liikumiseks võite kasutada boda-boda (mootorrikša). Tavaline (kohalik) hind lühikese sõidu eest on umbes 500 Kongo franki.

sentence: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.
sentence_translated: Koos oma suhtelise ligipääsmatusega on "Timbuktu" saanud metaforiks eksootilistele, kaugete maadele.

sentence: Today, Timbuktu is an impoverished town, although its reputation makes it a tourist attraction, and it has an airport.
sentence_translated: Täna on Timbuktu vaene linn, kuigi selle maine muudab selle turismiobjektiks ning seal on lennujaam.

sentence: In 1990, it was added to the list of world heritage sites in danger, due to the threat of desert sands.
sentence_translated: 1990. aastal lisati see maailmapärandi ohustatud objektide nimekirja, kuna kõrbeliivade oht.

sentence: It was one of the major stops during Henry Louis Gates' PBS special Wonders of the African World.
sentence_translated: See oli üks peamisi peatusi Henry Louis Gatesi PBS erisaates "Aafrika maailma imed".

sentence: The city is in stark contrast to the rest of the country's cities, because it has more of an Arabic flair than of an African.
sentence_translated: Linn on teravas kontrastis ülejäänud riigi linnadega, sest seal on rohkem araabia hõngu kui afrikalikku.

sentence: The Kruger National Park (KNP) lies in the north-east of South Africa and runs along the border of Mozambique in the east, Zimbabwe in the north, and the southern border is the Crocodile River.
sentence_translated: Krugeri rahvuspark (KNP) asub Lõuna-Aafrika kirdeosas ja ulatub idas Mosambiigi piirini, põhjas Zimbabwe piirini ning lõuna piiriks on Krokodillijõgi.

sentence: The park covers 19,500 km² and is divided in 14 different ecozones, each supporting different wildlife.
sentence_translated: Park katab 19 500 km² ja on jagatud 14 erinevaks ökoalaks, millest igaüks toetab erinevat loodust.

sentence: It is one of the main attractions of South Africa and it is considered the flagship of South African National Parks (SANParks).
sentence_translated: See on üks Lõuna-Aafrika peamisi atraktiivsusi ja seda peetakse Lõuna-Aafrika Rahvusparkide (SANParks) lipulaevaks.

sentence: As with all South African National Parks, there are daily conservation and entry fees for the park.
sentence_translated: Nagu kõikides Lõuna-Aafrika rahvusparkides, on pargis igapäevased kaitse- ja sissepääsutasud.

sentence: It may also be beneficial for one to buy a Wild Card, which provides entry to either selections of parks in South Africa or all of the South African National Parks.
sentence_translated: Samuti võib olla kasulik osta Wild Card, mis annab sissepääsu kas valitud parkidesse Lõuna-Aafrikas või kõigisse Lõuna-Aafrika rahvusparkidesse.

sentence: Hong Kong Island gives the territory of Hong Kong its name and is the place that many tourists regard as the main focus.
sentence_translated: Hongkongi saar annab Hongkongi territooriumile nime ja on koht, mida paljud turistid peavad peamiseks keskpunktiks.

sentence: The parade of buildings that make the Hong Kong skyline has been likened to a glittering bar chart that is made apparent by the presence of the waters of Victoria Harbour.
sentence_translated: Hooneparade, mis moodustab Hongkongi silueti, on sarnanenud sädelevate diagrammidega, mida rõhutab Victoria sadama veede kohalolek.

sentence: To get the best views of Hong Kong, leave the island and head for the Kowloon waterfront opposite.
sentence_translated: Parimate vaadete saamiseks Hongkongist lahkuge saarelt ja suunduge vastasolevale Kowlooni rannikule.

sentence: The great majority of Hong Kong Island's urban development is densely packed on reclaimed land along the northern shore.
sentence_translated: Suurem osa Hongkongi saare linnaplaneeringust on tihedalt kokku pakitud taastatud maal põhjarannikul.

sentence: This is the place the British colonisers took as their own and so if you are looking for evidence of the territory's colonial past, this is a good place to start.
sentence_translated: See on koht, mille Briti kolonisaatorid enda omaks võtsid, ja seega, kui otsite tõendeid territooriumi koloniaalse mineviku kohta, on see hea koht alustamiseks.

sentence: The Sundarbans are the largest littoral mangrove belt in the world, stretching 80 km (50 mi) into the Bangladeshi and Indian hinterland from the coast.
sentence_translated: Sundarbans on maailma suurim rannikuline mangroovivöönd, ulatudes 80 km (50 mi) Bangladeshi ja India sisemaale rannikust.

sentence: The Sundarbans has been declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The part of the forest within Indian territory is called Sundarbans National Park.
sentence_translated: Sundarbans on kuulutatud UNESCO maailmapärandi nimistusse. India territooriumil asuv mets osa nimetatakse Sundarbansi rahvuspargiks.

sentence: The forests aren't just mangrove swamps though — they include some of the last remaining stands of the mighty jungles which once covered the Gangetic plain.
sentence_translated: Metsad ei ole siiski ainult mangroovsood – need hõlmavad ka mõningaid viimaseid jäänuseid võimsatest džunglitest, mis kunagi kattis Gangetiku tasandikku.

sentence: The Sundarbans cover an area of 3,850 km², of which about one-third is covered in water/marsh areas.
sentence_translated: Sundarbans katab ala, mis on 3,850 km², millest umbes kolmandik on kaetud veega/soostikega.

sentence: Since 1966 the Sundarbans have been a wildlife sanctuary, and it is estimated that there are now 400 Royal Bengal tigers and about 30,000 spotted deer in the area.
sentence_translated: Alates 1966. aastast on Sundarbans olnud looduskaitseala ning hinnanguliselt on seal praegu 400 kuninglikku Bengalitigris ja umbes 30 000 laigulist hirve.

sentence: Buses depart the inter-district bus station (across the river) throughout the day, though most, especially those heading to the east and Jakar/Bumthang leave between 06:30 and 07:30.
sentence_translated: Bussid väljuvad linnaülest bussijaama (jõe vastas) kogu päeva jooksul, kuigi enamik, eriti need, mis suunduvad itta ja Jakar/Bumthangi, lahkuvad ajavahemikus 06:30 kuni 07:30.

sentence: As the inter-district buses are often full, it is advisable to purchase a ticket a few days in advance.
sentence_translated: Kuna linnaülesed bussid on sageli täis, on soovitatav osta pilet paar päeva ette.

sentence: Most districts are served by small Japanese Coaster Buses, which are comfortable and sturdy.
sentence_translated: Enamikku linnaosadest teenindavad väikesed Jaapani Coaster-bussid, mis on mugavad ja vastupidavad.

sentence: Shared taxis are a quick and comfortable means to travel to nearby places, such as Paro (Nu 150) and Punakha (Nu 200).
sentence_translated: Jagatud taksod on kiire ja mugav viis reisida lähedal asuvatesse kohtadesse, nagu Paro (Nu 150) ja Punakha (Nu 200).

sentence: The Oyapock River Bridge is a cable-stayed bridge. It spans the Oyapock River to link the cities of Oiapoque in Brazil and Saint-Georges de l'Oyapock in French Guiana.
sentence_translated: Oyapocki jõe sild on kaabelkanduriga sild. See ulatub üle Oyapocki jõe, et ühendada Oiapoque linn Brasiilias ja Saint-Georges de l'Oyapock linn Prantsuse Guajaanas.

sentence: The two towers rise to a height of 83 meters, it's 378 meters long and it has two lanes of 3.50 m wide.
sentence_translated: Kaks torni tõusevad 83 meetri kõrgusele, nende pikkus on 378 meetrit ja neil on kaks 3,50 m laiu sõidurada.

sentence: The vertical clearance under the bridge is 15 meters. Construction was completed in August 2011, it didn't open to traffic until March 2017.
sentence_translated: Silla all on vertikaalne kõrgus 15 meetrit. Ehitus lõpetati augustis 2011, kuid see ei avatud liiklusele enne märtsi 2017.

sentence: The bridge is scheduled to be fully operational in September 2017, when the Brazilian customs checkpoints are expected to be finished.
sentence_translated: Sild on kavandatud täielikult toimima 2017. aasta septembris, mil Brasiilia tollipunktide valmimine on oodata.

sentence: The Guaraní were the most significant indigenous group inhabiting what is now Eastern Paraguay, living as semi-nomadic hunters who also practised subsistence agriculture.
sentence_translated: Guaraní olid kõige olulisem põlisrahvas, kes elas praeguses Ida-Paraguays, olles pool-nomaadlikud jahimehed, kes praktiseerisid ka toimetuleku põllumajandust.

sentence: The Chaco region was home to other groups of indigenous tribes such as the Guaycurú and Payaguá, who survived by hunting, gathering and fishing.
sentence_translated: Chaco piirkond oli koduks ka teistele põlisrahvaste gruppidele, nagu Guaycurú ja Payaguá, kes elasid jahinduse, kogumise ja kalastamisega.

sentence: In the 16th century Paraguay, formerly called "The Giant Province of the Indies", was born as a result of the encounter of Spanish conquerors with the native indigenous groups.
sentence_translated: 16. sajandi Paraguays, mis varem kandis nime "Indiate Hiiglaslik Provints", sündis Hispaania vallutajate ja kohalike põlisrahvaste rühmade kohtumise tulemusena.

sentence: The Spaniards started the colonization period which lasted for three centuries.
sentence_translated: Hispaanlased alustasid koloniseerimise perioodi, mis kestis kolm sajandit.

sentence: Since the foundation of Asunción in 1537, Paraguay has managed to keep a lot of its indigenous character and identity.
sentence_translated: Alates Asuncióni asutamisest 1537. aastal on Paraguay suutnud säilitada palju oma põlisrahvaste iseloomu ja identiteeti.

sentence: Argentina is well known for having one of the best polo teams and players in the world.
sentence_translated: Argentina on tuntud kui üks parimaid polo meeskondi ja mängijaid maailmas.

sentence: The largest tournament of the year takes place in December at the polo fields in Las Cañitas.
sentence_translated: Aasta suurim turniir toimub detsembris Las Cañitase polo väljakutel.

sentence: Smaller tournaments and matches can also be seen here at other times of the year.
sentence_translated: Väiksemaid turniire ja mänge saab siin näha ka teistel aastaaegadel.

sentence: For news on tournaments and where to buy tickets for polo matches, check Asociacion Argentina de Polo.
sentence_translated: Turniiride uudiste ja polo matšide piletite ostmise kohta vaata Asociacion Argentina de Polo.

sentence: The official Falklands currency is the Falkland pound (FKP) whose value is set equivalent to that of one British pound (GBP).
sentence_translated: Falklandi ametlik valuuta on Falklandi nael (FKP), mille väärtus on seatud vastama ühe Briti naela (GBP) väärtusele.

sentence: Money can be exchanged at the only bank in the islands which is located in Stanley across from the FIC West store.
sentence_translated: Raha saab vahetada ainukeses pangas saartel, mis asub Stanleys, FIC Lääne poe vastas.

sentence: British pounds will generally be accepted anywhere in the islands and within Stanley credit cards and United States dollars are also often accepted.
sentence_translated: Briti naelu aktsepteeritakse üldiselt igal pool saartel ja Stanley's aktsepteeritakse sageli ka krediitkaarte ja Ameerika Ühendriikide dollareid.

sentence: On the outlying islands credit cards will probably not be accepted, although British and United States currency may be taken; check with the owners in advance to determine what is an acceptable payment method.
sentence_translated: Kaugetel saartele ei pruugi krediitkaarte vastu võtta, kuigi Briti ja Ameerika Ühendriikide valuutat võib aktsepteerida; kontrollige eelnevalt omanikega, et selgitada välja, milline makseviis on vastuvõetav.

sentence: It is nearly impossible to exchange Falklands currency outside of the islands, so exchange money prior to leaving the islands.
sentence_translated: Falklandi saarte valuutat on peaaegu võimatu vahetada väljaspool saari, seega vahetage raha enne saartest lahkumist.

sentence: Since Montevideo is south of the Equator, it is summer there when it's winter in the Northern Hemisphere and vice versa.
sentence_translated: Kuna Montevideo asub ekvaatorist lõunas, on seal suvi, kui põhja poolkeral on talv ja vastupidi.

sentence: Montevideo is in the subtropics; in the summer months, temperatures above +30°C are common.
sentence_translated: Montevideo asub subtroopikas; suvekuudel on temperatuurid üle +30°C tavalised.

sentence: The winter can be deceptively chilly: temperatures rarely go below freezing, but the wind and humidity combine to make it feel colder than what the thermometer says.
sentence_translated: Talv võib olla petlikult külm: temperatuurid harva langevad nullist alla, kuid tuul ja niiskus koos teevad selle tundmise külmemaks, kui termomeeter näitab.

sentence: There are no particular "rainy" and "dry" seasons: the amount of rain stays roughly the same throughout the year.
sentence_translated: Erilisi "vihmaseid" ja "kuivi" hooaegu ei ole: vihma hulk jääb kogu aasta jooksul enam-vähem samaks.

sentence: Though many of the animals in the park are used to seeing humans, the wildlife is nonetheless wild and should not be fed or disturbed.
sentence_translated: Kuigi paljud pargis olevad loomad on harjunud inimesi nägema, on loodus siiski metsik ning neid ei tohi toita ega häirida.

sentence: According to park authorities, stay at least 100 yards/meters away from bears and wolves and 25 yards/meters from all other wild animals!
sentence_translated: Parki ametivõimude sõnul hoidke karudest ja huntidest vähemalt 100 jardi/meetri kaugusel ning kõigist teistest metsloomadest vähemalt 25 jardi/meetri kaugusel!

sentence: No matter how docile they may look, bison, elk, moose, bears, and nearly all large animals can attack.
sentence_translated: Ükskõik kui leebed nad välja võivad näha, võivad piisonid, hirved, põhjapõdrad, karud ja peaaegu kõik suured loomad rünnata.

sentence: Each year, dozens of visitors are injured because they didn't keep a proper distance. These animals are large, wild, and potentially dangerous, so give them their space.
sentence_translated: Igal aastal saavad kümned külastajad vigastada, kuna nad ei hoidnud õiget vahemaad. Need loomad on suured, metsikud ja potentsiaalselt ohtlikud, seega andke neile oma ruumi.

sentence: In addition, be aware that odors attract bears and other wildlife, so avoid carrying or cooking odorous foods and keep a clean camp.
sentence_translated: Lisaks olge teadlik, et lõhnad tõmbavad karusid ja teisi metsloomi, seega vältige lõhnaste toitude kandmist või valmistamist ning hoidke oma laager puhtana.

sentence: Apia is the capital of Samoa. The town is on the island of Upolu and has a population of just under 40,000.
sentence_translated: Apia on Samoa pealinn. Linn asub Upolu saarel ja seal elab veidi alla 40 000 inimese.

sentence: Apia was founded in the 1850s and has been the official capital of Samoa since 1959.
sentence_translated: Apia asutati 1850. aastatel ja on olnud Samoa ametlik pealinn alates 1959. aastast.

sentence: The harbor was the site of an infamous naval standoff in 1889 when seven ships from Germany, the US, and Britain refused to leave the harbor.
sentence_translated: Sadama juures toimus 1889. aastal kuulus mereväe seismine, kui seitse laeva Saksamaalt, USA-st ja Suurbritanniast keeldusid sadamast lahkumast.

sentence: All the ships were sunk, except for one British cruiser. Nearly 200 American and German lives were lost.
sentence_translated: Kõik laevad olid uppunud, välja arvatud üks Briti kruiiser. Peaaegu 200 Ameerika ja Saksa elu kaotati.

sentence: During the struggle for independence organised by the Mau movement, a peaceful gathering in the town resulted in the killing of the paramount chief Tupua Tamasese Lealofi III.
sentence_translated: Iseseisvuse nimel toimunud Mau liikumise korraldatud võitluse käigus leidis linnas aset rahumeelne kogunemine, mille käigus tapeti peamine juht Tupua Tamasese Lealofi III.

sentence: There are many beaches, due to Auckland's straddling of two harbours. The most popular ones are in three areas.
sentence_translated: Aucklandi kahe sadama vahel asumise tõttu on palju randu. Kõige populaarsemad asuvad kolmes piirkonnas.

sentence: North Shore beaches (in North Harbour district) are on the Pacific Ocean and stretch from Long Bay in the north to Devonport in the south.
sentence_translated: Põhjaranniku rannad (Põhja-Sadama piirkonnas) asuvad Vaikse ookeani ääres ja ulatuvad põhjas Long Bay'st lõunas Devonportini.

sentence: They are almost all sandy beaches with safe swimming, and most have shade provided by pohutukawa trees.
sentence_translated: Need on peaaegu kõik liivased rannad, kus ujumine on ohutu, ja enamikul on varju pakkuvad pohutukawa puud.

sentence: Tamaki Drive beaches are on the Waitemata Harbour, in the upmarket suburbs of Mission Bay and St Heliers in Central Auckland.
sentence_translated: Tamaki Drive'i rannad asuvad Waitemata sadamas, Mission Bay ja St Heliers'i kallites eeslinnades Aucklandi kesklinnas.

sentence: These are sometimes-crowded family beaches with a good range of shops lining the shore. Swimming is safe.
sentence_translated: Need on mõnikord rahvarohked pererannad, mille ääres on hea valik poode. Ujumine on ohutu.

sentence: The main local beer is 'Number One', it is not a complex beer, but pleasant and refreshing. The other local beer is called "Manta".
sentence_translated: Peamine kohalik õlu on 'Number One', see ei ole keeruline õlu, vaid meeldiv ja värskendav. Teine kohalik õlu on nimega "Manta".

sentence: There are many French wines to be had, but the New Zealand and Australian wines might travel better.
sentence_translated: Prantsuse veine on palju, kuid Uus-Meremaa ja Austraalia veinid võivad paremini reisida.

sentence: The local tap water is perfectly safe to drink, but bottled water is easy to find if you are fearful.
sentence_translated: Kohalik kraanivesi on täiesti ohutu juua, kuid pudelivett on lihtne leida, kui sa kardad.

sentence: For Australians, the idea of 'flat white' coffee is foreign. A short black is 'espresso', cappuccino comes heaped high with cream (not froth), and tea is served without milk.
sentence_translated: Austraallaste jaoks on "flat white" kohvi idee võõras. Lühike must on "espresso", cappuccino serveeritakse kõrge koorega (mitte vahuga) ja teed pakutakse ilma piimata.

sentence: The hot chocolate is up to Belgian standards. Fruit juices are pricey but excellent.
sentence_translated: Kuum šokolaad vastab Belgia standarditele. Puuviljamahlad on kallid, kuid suurepärased.

sentence: Many trips to the reef are made all year around, and injuries due to any of these causes on the reef are rare.
sentence_translated: Rifile tehakse palju reise kogu aasta jooksul ja vigastused, mis on põhjustatud mõnest neist põhjustest rifil, on haruldased.

sentence: Still, take advice from authorities, obey all signs, and pay close attention to safety warnings.
sentence_translated: Siiski, võtke nõu ametnikelt, järgige kõiki märke ja pöörake tähelepanu ohutushoiatusetele.

sentence: Box jellyfish occur near beaches and near river estuaries from October to April north of 1770. They can occasionally be found outside these times.
sentence_translated: Karbikammeljad esinevad rannalähedastes vetes ja jõgede suudmest alates oktoobrist kuni aprillini põhja pool 1770. aastast. Neid võib aeg-ajalt leida ka väljaspool neid aegu.

sentence: Sharks do exist, however they rarely attack humans. Most sharks are scared of humans and would swim away.
sentence_translated: Haiad tõepoolest eksisteerivad, kuid nad ründavad harva inimesi. Enamik haiadest kardab inimesi ja ujub eemale.

sentence: Saltwater Crocodiles do not actively live in the ocean, their primary habitat is in river estuaries north from Rockhampton.
sentence_translated: Soolased krokodillid ei ela aktiivselt ookeanis, nende peamine elupaik on jõgede suudmed Rockhamptoni põhjaosas.

sentence: Booking in advance gives the traveller peace of mind that they will have somewhere to sleep once they arrive at their destination.
sentence_translated: Eelnevalt broneerimine annab reisijale rahu, et sihtkohas on tal koht, kus magada.

sentence: Travel agents often have deals with specific hotels, although you may find it possible to book other forms of accommodation, like camping grounds, through a travel agent.
sentence_translated: Reisiagendid omavad sageli kokkuleppeid konkreetsete hotellidega, kuigi võib leida, et on võimalik broneerida ka muid majutusvorme, nagu näiteks telkimisplatsid, reisiagendi kaudu.

sentence: Travel agents usually offer packages that include breakfast, transportation arrangements to/from the airport or even combined flight and hotel packages.
sentence_translated: Reisiagendid pakuvad tavaliselt pakette, mis sisaldavad hommikusööki, transpordikorraldusi lennujaama ja tagasi või isegi kombineeritud lennu- ja hotellipakette.

sentence: They can also hold the reservation for you if you need time to think about the offer or procure other documents for your destination (e.g. visa).
sentence_translated: Nad saavad ka teie eest broneeringu kinni hoida, kui vajate aega pakkumise üle mõtlemiseks või sihtkoha jaoks teiste dokumentide hankimiseks (nt viisa).

sentence: Any amendments or requests though should be coursed through the travel agent first and not directly with the hotel.
sentence_translated: Kõik muudatused või taotlused peaksid esmalt olema suunatud reisibüroole, mitte otse hotellile.

sentence: For some festivals, the vast majority of the attendants to music festivals decide to camp on site, and most attendants consider it a vital part of the experience.
sentence_translated: Mõnede festivalide puhul otsustab suur enamus muusikafestivalide külastajatest ööbida kohapeal ning enamik külastajatest peab seda elamuse hädavajalikuks osaks.

sentence: If you want to be close to the action you're going to have to get in early to get a camping site close to the music.
sentence_translated: Kui soovid olla tegevuse lähedal, pead varakult kohale minema, et saada telkimiskoht muusika lähedal.

sentence: Remember that even though music on the main stages may have finished, there may be sections of the festival that will keep playing music until late into the night.
sentence_translated: Pea meeles, et kuigi muusika pealaval võib olla lõppenud, võivad festivali osad jätkata muusika mängimist hilisõhtuni.

sentence: Some festivals have special camping areas for families with young children.
sentence_translated: Mõned festivalid pakuvad eraldi telkimisalasid peredele, kus on väikesed lapsed.

sentence: If crossing the Northern Baltic in winter, check the cabin location, as going through ice causes quite horrible noise for those most affected.
sentence_translated: Kui ületate talvel Põhja-Balti, kontrollige kabiini asukohta, kuna jääst läbi sõitmine tekitab neile, keda see kõige rohkem mõjutab, üsna kohutavat müra.

sentence: Saint Petersburg cruises include time in town. Cruise passengers are exempted from visa requirements (check the terms).
sentence_translated: Peterburi kruiisid sisaldavad aega linnas. Kruiisireisijad on vabastatud viisanõuetest (kontrollige tingimusi).

sentence: Casinos typically make many efforts to maximize time and money spent by guests. Windows and clocks are usually absent, and exits can be hard to find.
sentence_translated: Kasiinod teevad tavaliselt palju pingutusi, et maksimeerida külaliste veedetud aega ja raha. Aknaid ja kelli on tavaliselt puuduvad ning väljapääsud võivad olla raskesti leitavad.

sentence: They usually have special food, drink and entertainment offers, to keep guests in a good mood, and keep them at the premise.
sentence_translated: Neil on tavaliselt erilised toidu-, joogi- ja meelelahutuspakkumised, et hoida külalisi heas tujus ja hoida neid ruumides.

sentence: Some venues offer alcoholic beverages on the house. However, drunkenness impairs judgement, and all good gamblers know the importance of staying sober.
sentence_translated: Mõned kohad pakuvad alkohoolseid jooke tasuta. Siiski, joobesolek halvendab otsustusvõimet ja kõik head mängijad teavad, kui oluline on kainena püsida.

sentence: Anyone who's going to drive at high latitudes or over mountain passes should consider the possibility of snow, ice, or freezing temperatures.
sentence_translated: Igaüks, kes kavatseb sõita kõrgetel laiuskraadidel või mägiteedel, peaks arvestama lume, jää või külmade temperatuuride võimalusega.

sentence: On icy and snowy roadways, friction is low and you cannot drive as if you were on bare asphalt.
sentence_translated: Jäistel ja lumistel teedel on hõõrdumine madal ning sa ei saa sõita nagu oleksid paljal asfaltteel.

sentence: During blizzards, enough snow to get you stuck can fall in very little time.
sentence_translated: Lumesajus võib piisav kogus lund, mis teid kinni jääb, langeda väga lühikese aja jooksul.

sentence: Visibility may also be restricted by falling or blowing snow or by condensation or ice on vehicle windows.
sentence_translated: Nähtavust võivad piirata ka langev või puhuv lumi või kondensatsioon või jää sõiduki akendel.

sentence: On the other hand, icy and snowy conditions are normal in many countries, and traffic goes on mostly uninterrupted all year round.
sentence_translated: Teiselt poolt on jää- ja lumetingimused paljudes riikides normaalsed ning liiklus kulgeb enamasti katkestusteta kogu aasta vältel.

sentence: Safaris are perhaps the greatest tourism draw in Africa and the highlight for many visitors.
sentence_translated: Safarid on võib-olla suurim turismi tõmbejõud Aafrikas ja paljude külastajate tipphetk.

sentence: The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.
sentence_translated: Sõna safari, nagu seda populaarselt kasutatakse, viitab maanteereisile, et näha hämmastavat Aafrika loodust, eriti savannil.

sentence: Some animals, such as elephants and giraffes, tend to approach closely to cars and standard equipment will allow good viewing.
sentence_translated: Mõned loomad, nagu elevandid ja kaelkirjakud, kipuvad autodele lähedale tulema ning tavaline varustus võimaldab head vaatlemist.

sentence: Lions, cheetahs and leopards are sometimes shy and you will see them better with binoculars.
sentence_translated: Lõvid, gepardid ja leopardid on mõnikord tagasihoidlikud ja te näete neid paremini binoklite abil.

sentence: A walking safari (also called a "bush walk", "hiking safari", or going "footing") consists of hiking, either for a few hours or several days.
sentence_translated: Jalgsimatk (tuntud ka kui "põhjaline jalutuskäik", "matkamise safar" või "jalgsi minek") koosneb matkamist, kas paar tundi või mitu päeva.

sentence: The Paralympics will take place from 24 August to 5 September 2021. Some events will be held in other locations throughout Japan.
sentence_translated: Paralümpiamängud toimuvad 24. augustist kuni 5. septembrini 2021. Mõned üritused toimuvad teistes kohtades üle Jaapani.

sentence: Tokyo will be the only Asian city to have hosted two summer Olympics, having hosted the games in 1964.
sentence_translated: Tokyo on ainus Aasia linn, mis on korraldanud kaks suveolümpiat, olles mängud korraldanud 1964. aastal.

sentence: If you booked your flights and accommodation for 2020 before the postponement was announced, you may have a tricky situation.
sentence_translated: Kui broneerisite oma lennud ja majutuse 2020. aastaks enne, kui edasilükkamine kuulutati välja, võib teil olla keeruline olukord.

sentence: Cancellation policies vary, but as of late March most coronavirus-based cancellation policies don't extend to July 2020, when the Olympics had been scheduled.
sentence_translated: Tühistamispoliitikad erinevad, kuid märtsi lõpust alates ei laiene enamik koroonaviirusega seotud tühistamispoliitikaid juulile 2020, kui olümpiamängud olid planeeritud.

sentence: It's expected that most event tickets will cost between ¥2,500 and ¥130,000, with typical tickets costing around ¥7,000.
sentence_translated: Oodatakse, et enamik ürituste pileteid maksab vahemikus ¥2,500 kuni ¥130,000, kusjuures tüüpilised piletid maksavad umbes ¥7,000.

sentence: Ironing damp clothes can help them dry. Many hotels have an iron and ironing board available for loan, even if one is not present in the room.
sentence_translated: Niiskete riiete triikimine võib aidata neil kuivada. Paljudes hotellides on laenamiseks saadaval triikraud ja triikimislaud, isegi kui neid ei ole toas.

sentence: If an iron isn't available, or if you don't fancy wearing ironed socks, then you can try using a hairdryer, if available.
sentence_translated: Kui triikrauda pole saadaval või kui sa ei soovi kanda triigitud sokke, siis võid proovida kasutada föönit, kui see on saadaval.

sentence: Be careful not to allow fabric to become too hot (which can cause shrinkage, or in extreme cases, scorch).
sentence_translated: Olge ettevaatlik, et kangas ei kuumeneks liiga palju (see võib põhjustada kokku tõmbumist või äärmuslikel juhtudel isegi põlemist).

sentence: There are different ways of purifying water, some more effective against specific threats.
sentence_translated: Veepuhastamiseks on erinevaid viise, mõned on tõhusamad spetsiifiliste ohtude vastu.

sentence: In some areas boiling water for a minute is enough, in others several minutes are needed.
sentence_translated: Mõnes piirkonnas piisab keeva vee keetmisest minut, teistes on vajalik mitu minutit.

sentence: Filters vary in effectiveness, and should you have a concern, then you should consider buying your water in a sealed bottle from a reputable company.
sentence_translated: Filtrite efektiivsus varieerub ning kui teil on mure, siis peaksite kaaluma oma vee ostmist suletud pudelis usaldusväärselt ettevõttelt.

sentence: Travellers may encounter animal pests that they are not familiar with in their home regions.
sentence_translated: Reisijad võivad kohtuda loomsete kahjuritega, millega nad ei ole oma kodupiirkondades tuttavad.

sentence: Pests can spoil food, cause irritation, or in a worse case cause allergic reactions, spread venom, or transmit infections.
sentence_translated: Kahjurid võivad rikneda toitu, põhjustada ärritust või halvemal juhul põhjustada allergilisi reaktsioone, levitada mürk või edastada nakkusi.

sentence: Infectious diseases themselves, or dangerous animals that can injure or kill people by force, do not usually qualify as pests.
sentence_translated: Infektsioossed haigused ise või ohtlikud loomad, kes võivad inimesi jõhkralt vigastada või tappa, ei kvalifitseeru tavaliselt kahjuriteks.

sentence: Duty free shopping is the opportunity to buy goods exempted from taxes and excises at certain locations.
sentence_translated: Kohustuseta ostlemine on võimalus osta kaupu, mis on teatud kohtades maksudest ja aktsiisidest vabastatud.

sentence: Travellers bound for countries with heavy taxation can sometimes save a considerable amount of money, especially on products such as alcoholic beverages and tobacco.
sentence_translated: Reisijad, kes suunduvad riikidesse, kus on kõrged maksud, saavad mõnikord säästa märkimisväärset summat raha, eriti selliste toodete nagu alkohoolsed joogid ja tubakas osas.

sentence: The stretch between Point Marion and Fairmont presents the most challenging driving conditions on the Buffalo-Pittsburgh Highway, passing frequently through isolated backwoods terrain.
sentence_translated: Marioni punktist Fairmonti punktini ulatuv lõik esitab Buffalo-Pittsburghi maanteel kõige keerulisemad sõidutingimused, läbides sageli eraldatud metsamaad.

sentence: If you're not used to driving on country roads, keep your wits about you: steep grades, narrow lanes, and sharp curves predominate.
sentence_translated: Kui te ei ole harjunud maanteedel sõitma, hoidke oma meelt erksana: järskude tõusude, kitsaste teede ja teravate kurvidega on palju.

sentence: Posted speed limits are noticeably lower than in previous and subsequent sections — commonly 35-40 mph (56-64 km/h) — and strict obedience to them is even more important than otherwise.
sentence_translated: Postitatud kiiruspiirangud on märgatavalt madalamad kui eelnevates ja järgnevates lõikudes — tavaliselt 35-40 miili tunnis (56-64 km/h) — ning nendele rangelt allumine on veelgi olulisem kui muidu.

sentence: Curiously, though, mobile phone service is much stronger here than along many other stretches of the route, e.g. the Pennsylvania Wilds.
sentence_translated: Kuid huvitaval kombel on mobiiltelefoniteenuse signaal siin palju tugevam kui paljudes teistes marsruudi lõikudes, nt Pennsylvania Wildsis.

sentence: German pastries are quite good, and in Bavaria, are quite rich and varied, similar to those of their southern neighbor, Austria.
sentence_translated: Saksa küpsetised on üsna head ning Baieris on need üsna rikkad ja mitmekesised, sarnased nende lõunanaabri, Austria omadele.

sentence: Fruit pastries are common, with apples cooked into pastries year round, and cherries and plums making their appearances during the summer.
sentence_translated: Puuviljapirukad on tavalised, õunad on aastaringselt pirukatesse küpsetatud ning kirsi- ja ploomiaeg on suvel.

sentence: Many German baked goods also feature almonds, hazelnuts, and other tree nuts. Popular cakes often pair particularly well with a cup of strong coffee.
sentence_translated: Paljud Saksamaa küpsetised sisaldavad ka mandleid, sarapuupähkleid ja teisi puuviljapähkleid. Populaarsed koogid sobivad eriti hästi tugeva kohvi kõrvale.

sentence: If you want some small though rich pastries, try what depending on region are called Berliner, Pfannkuchen or Krapfen.
sentence_translated: Kui soovite mõningaid väikeseid, kuid rikkalikke küpsetisi, proovige seda, mida sõltuvalt piirkonnast nimetatakse Berliinideks, Pfannkucheniteks või Krapfeniteks.

sentence: A curry is a dish based on herbs and spices, together with either meat or vegetables.
sentence_translated: Karrie on roog, mis põhineb ürtidel ja vürtsidel, koos kas liha või köögiviljadega.

sentence: A curry can be either "dry" or "wet" depending on the amount of liquid.
sentence_translated: Karril võib olla kas "kuiv" või "märg", sõltuvalt vedeliku hulgast.

sentence: In inland regions of Northern India and Pakistan, yogurt is commonly used in curries; in Southern India and some other coastal regions of the subcontinent, coconut milk is commonly used.
sentence_translated: Põhja-India ja Pakistanis, sisemaapiirkondades, kasutatakse jogurtit sageli karrides; Lõuna-Indias ja mõnes muus subkontinendi rannikupiirkonnas kasutatakse sageli kookospiima.

sentence: With 17,000 islands to choose from, Indonesian food is an umbrella term covering a vast variety of regional cuisines found across the nation.
sentence_translated: 17 000 saarega, millest valida, on Indoneesia toit katvaks mõisteks, mis hõlmab suurt hulka piirkondlikke kööke, mida leidub üle kogu riigi.

sentence: But, if used without further qualifiers, the term tends to mean the food originally from the central and eastern parts of the main island Java.
sentence_translated: Kuid kui seda kasutatakse ilma täiendavate kvalifikaatoriteta, tähendab see tavaliselt toitu, mis on algselt pärit peamise saare Java kesk- ja idaosadest.

sentence: Now widely available throughout the archipelago, Javanese cuisine features an array of simply seasoned dishes, the predominant flavorings the Javanese favor being peanuts, chillies, sugar (especially Javanese coconut sugar) and various aromatic spices.
sentence_translated: Nüüd on Jaava köök laialdaselt saadaval kogu arhipelaagis, pakkudes mitmekesist valikut lihtsalt maitsestatud roogasid, mille peamised maitsed, mida jaavalased eelistavad, on maapähklid, tšillid, suhkur (eriti jaava kookos suhkur) ja erinevad aroomiained.

sentence: Stirrups are supports for the rider's feet that hang down on either side of the saddle.
sentence_translated: Jalakandjad on toe toetused ratsaniku jalgadele, mis ripuvad sadula mõlemal küljel.

sentence: They provide greater stability for the rider but can have safety concerns due to the potential for a rider's feet to get stuck in them.
sentence_translated: Need pakuvad ratsutajale suuremat stabiilsust, kuid võivad tekitada ohutegureid, kuna ratsutaja jalad võivad neisse kinni jääda.

sentence: If a rider is thrown from a horse but has a foot caught in the stirrup, they could be dragged if the horse runs away. To minimize this risk, a number of safety precautions can be taken.
sentence_translated: Kui ratsutaja visatakse hobuselt maha, kuid tema jalg jääb jalus kinni, võib teda lohistada, kui hobune põgeneb. Selle riski vähendamiseks saab rakendada mitmeid ohutusmeetmeid.

sentence: First, most riders wear riding boots with a heel and a smooth, quite narrow, sole.
sentence_translated: Esiteks kannavad enamik ratsutajaid ratsutamissaapaid, millel on konts ja sile, üsna kitsas tall.

sentence: Next, some saddles, particularly English saddles, have safety bars that allow a stirrup leather to fall off the saddle if pulled backwards by a falling rider.
sentence_translated: Järgmine, mõned sadulad, eriti inglise sadulad, on varustatud turvabarjidega, mis võimaldavad jaluse nahal sadulast lahti tulla, kui see tõmmatakse tagasi kukkuva ratsaniku poolt.

sentence: Cochamó Valley - Chile's premier climbing destination, known as the Yosemite of South America, with a variety of granite big walls and crags.
sentence_translated: Cochamó org - Tšiili peamine ronimiskoht, tuntud kui Lõuna-Ameerika Yosemite, kus on mitmekesised graniidist suured seina- ja kaljukohtade võimalused.

sentence: Summits include breath-taking views from peaks. Climbers from all parts of the world are continually establishing new routes amongst its endless potential of walls.
sentence_translated: Tippud pakuvad hingematvaid vaateid harjadelt. Ronijad kõikjalt maailmast loovad pidevalt uusi radu selle lõputute seinte võimaluste seas.

sentence: Downhill snowsports, which include skiing and snowboarding, are popular sports involving sliding down snow-covered terrain with skis or a snowboard attached to your feet.
sentence_translated: Allamäge lumespordialad, mis hõlmavad suusatamist ja lumelauaga sõitmist, on populaarsed spordialad, mis hõlmavad libisemist allamäge lumega kaetud maastikul suuskade või lumelauda jalgade külge kinnitatuna.

sentence: Skiing is a major travelling activity with many enthusiasts, occasionally known as "ski bums," planning entire vacations around skiing at a particular location.
sentence_translated: Suusatamine on suur reisimise tegevus, millel on palju entusiaste, keda mõnikord tuntakse kui "suusabuumid", kes plaanivad terveid puhkusi suusatamiseks kindlas kohas.

sentence: The idea of skiing is very old — cave paintings depicting skiers date back as far as 5000 BC!
sentence_translated: Suusatamise idee on väga vana — koobaspildid, mis kujutavad suusatajaid, ulatuvad tagasi lausa 5000 eKr!

sentence: Downhill skiing as a sport goes back to at least the 17th century, and in 1861 the first recreational ski club was opened by Norwegians in Australia.
sentence_translated: Allamäge suusatamine kui sport ulatub vähemalt 17. sajandisse ja 1861. aastal avasid norralased Austraalias esimese meelelahutusliku suusaklubi.

sentence: Backpacking by ski: This activity is also called backcountry ski, ski touring or ski hiking.
sentence_translated: Seljakotiga suusatamine: Seda tegevust nimetatakse ka maastikusuusatamiseks, suusamatkamiseks või suusamatkamiseks.

sentence: It is related to but usually not involving alpine style ski touring or mountaineering, the latter ones done in steep terrain and requiring much stiffer skis and boots.
sentence_translated: See on seotud, kuid tavaliselt ei hõlma alpi stiilis suusatamist või mägironimist, viimased toimuvad järskudel maastikel ja nõuavad palju jäigemate suuskade ja saapade kasutamist.

sentence: Think of the skiing route as of a similar hiking route.
sentence_translated: Mõtle suusarajale kui sarnasele matkarajale.

sentence: In good conditions you will be able to cover somewhat greater distances than walking – but only very seldom you will get the speeds of cross country skiing without a heavy backpack in groomed tracks.
sentence_translated: Heades tingimustes suudate katta mõnevõrra suuremaid vahemaid kui kõndides – kuid ainult väga harva saavutate maastikuisu kiirus, kui teil pole raskes seljakotis ja suusatate hooldatud radadel.

sentence: Europe is a continent that is relatively small but with many independent countries. Under normal circumstances, travelling through multiple countries would mean having to go through visa applications and passport control multiple times.
sentence_translated: Euroopa on suhteliselt väike kontinent, kuid seal on palju iseseisvaid riike. Tavalistes oludes tähendaks mitme riigi läbimine viisa taotlemist ja passikontrolli läbimist mitu korda.

sentence: The Schengen zone, however, works somewhat like one country in this respect.
sentence_translated: Schengeni ala, kuid toimib selles osas veidi nagu üks riik.

sentence: As long as you stay in this zone, you can generally cross borders without going through passport control checkpoints again.
sentence_translated: Nii kaua kui viibid selles tsoonis, saad üldiselt ületada piire ilma, et peaksid uuesti läbima passikontrolli punkte.

sentence: Similarly, by having a Schengen visa, you do not need to apply for visas to each of the Schengen member countries separately, hence saving time, money and paperwork.
sentence_translated: Sarnaselt, Schengeni viisa omamine tähendab, et teil ei ole vaja taotleda viisasid iga Schengeni liikmesriigi jaoks eraldi, säästes seeläbi aega, raha ja paberimajandust.

sentence: There is no universal definition for which manufactured items are antiques. Some tax agencies define goods older than 100 years as antiques.
sentence_translated: Ühtset määratlust, millised valmistooted on antiigid, ei ole olemas. Mõned maksuküsimuste ametid määratlevad üle 100 aasta vanused kaubad antiikidena.

sentence: The definition has geographic variations, where the age limit might be shorter in places such as North America than in Europe.
sentence_translated: Mõisted on geograafiliselt varieeruvad, kus vanusepiirang võib olla lühem kohtades nagu Põhja-Ameerika kui Euroopas.

sentence: Handicraft products might be defined as antiques, though they are younger than similar mass-produced goods.
sentence_translated: Käsitöötooteid võib määratleda kui antiikesemeid, kuigi need on nooremad kui sarnased massiliselt toodetud kaubad.

sentence: Reindeer husbandry is an important livelihood among the Sámi and the culture surrounding the trade is important also for many with other professions.
sentence_translated: Põdrakasvatus on oluline elatusallikas saamide seas ning selle kaubanduse ümber olev kultuur on oluline ka paljudele teiste ametite esindajatele.

sentence: Even traditionally, though, not all Sámi have been involved in big scale reindeer husbandry, but lived from fishing, hunting and similar, having reindeer mostly as draft animals.
sentence_translated: Ieven traditsiooniliselt ei ole kõik saamilased olnud seotud suuremahulise põhjapõtrade pidamisega, vaid on elanud kalastamisest, jahindusest ja sarnastest tegevustest, omades põhjapõtru peamiselt tõllana.

sentence: Today many Sámi work in modern trades. Tourism is an important income in Sápmi, the Sámi area.
sentence_translated: Tänapäeval töötab paljusid saami kaasaegsetes ametites. Turism on oluline sissetulek Sápmi's, saami piirkonnas.

sentence: Though it is widely used, especially among non-Romani, the word "Gypsy" is often considered offensive because of its associations with negative stereotypes and inaccurate perceptions of Romani people.
sentence_translated: Kuigi seda kasutatakse laialdaselt, eriti mitte-romade seas, peetakse sõna "tsigaan" sageli solvavaks, kuna sellega seostatakse negatiivseid stereotüüpe ja ebatäpset arusaama romade inimeste kohta.

sentence: If the country you will be visiting becomes subject to a travel advisory, your travel health insurance or your trip cancellation insurance may be affected.
sentence_translated: Kui riik, kuhu kavatsete reisida, muutub reisisoovituse alla, võib see mõjutada teie reisitervise kindlustust või teie reisitühistamise kindlustust.

sentence: You may also wish to consult the advice of governments other than your own, but their advice is designed for their citizens.
sentence_translated: Võite soovida konsulteerida ka teiste valitsuste nõuannetega, kuid nende nõuanded on mõeldud nende kodanikele.

sentence: As one example, American citizens in the Middle East might face different situations from Europeans or Arabs.
sentence_translated: Ühe näitena võivad Ameerika Ühendriikide kodanikud Lähis-Idas seista silmitsi erinevate olukordadega kui eurooplased või araablased.

sentence: Advisories are merely a brief summary of the political situation in one country.
sentence_translated: Teatised on lihtsalt lühike kokkuvõte poliitilisest olukorrast ühes riigis.

sentence: The views presented are often cursory, general and oversimplified compared to the more detailed information available elsewhere.
sentence_translated: Esitatud vaated on sageli pinnapealsed, üldised ja liialt lihtsustatud võrreldes mujal saadaval oleva detailsema teabega.

sentence: Severe weather is the generic term for any dangerous weather phenomenon with the potential to cause damage, serious social disruption, or loss of human life.
sentence_translated: Raske ilm on üldine mõiste mis tahes ohtliku ilmastikunähtuse jaoks, millel on potentsiaal tekitada kahju, tõsist sotsiaalset segadust või inimelude kaotust.

sentence: Severe weather can occur anywhere in the world, and there are different types of it, which can depend on geography, topography, and atmospheric conditions.
sentence_translated: Tõsine ilm võib esineda igal pool maailmas ning sellel on erinevaid tüüpe, mis võivad sõltuda geograafiast, topograafiast ja atmosfääri tingimustest.

sentence: High winds, hail, excessive precipitation, and wildfires are forms and effects of severe weather, as are thunderstorms, tornadoes, waterspouts, and cyclones.
sentence_translated: Kõrged tuuled, rahe, liigne sademehulk ja metsapõlengud on äärmusliku ilma vormid ja mõjud, nagu ka äikesetormid, tornaadod, veepöörised ja tsüklonid.

sentence: Regional and seasonal severe weather phenomena include blizzards, snowstorms, ice storms, and dust storms.
sentence_translated: Regionaalsed ja hooajalised äärmuslikud ilmastikunähtused hõlmavad lumetorme, lumesadusid, jääsadu ja tolmutorme.

sentence: Travellers are strongly advised to be aware of any risk of severe weather affecting their area as they may affect any travel plans.
sentence_translated: Reisijatele soovitatakse tungivalt olla teadlikud mis tahes tõsise ilmastiku riskidest, mis võivad nende piirkonda mõjutada, kuna need võivad mõjutada reisiplaane.

sentence: Anyone planning a visit to a country that could be considered a war zone should get professional training.
sentence_translated: Igaüks, kes plaanib külastada riiki, mida võiks pidada sõjavööndiks, peaks saama professionaalset väljaõpet.

sentence: A search of the Internet for 'Hostile environment course' will probably provide the address of a local company.
sentence_translated: Internetist otsimine fraasiga 'Vaenuliku keskkonna kursus' annab tõenäoliselt kohaliku ettevõtte aadressi.

sentence: A course will normally cover all the issues discussed here in far greater detail, usually with practical experience.
sentence_translated: Kursus käsitleb tavaliselt kõiki siin arutatud teemasid palju põhjalikumalt, tavaliselt koos praktilise kogemusega.

sentence: A course will normally be from 2-5 days and will involve role play, a lot of first aid and sometimes weapons training.
sentence_translated: Kursus kestab tavaliselt 2-5 päeva ja hõlmab rollimänge, palju esmaabi ning mõnikord relvakoolitust.

sentence: Books and magazines dealing with wilderness survival are common, but publications dealing with war zones are few.
sentence_translated: Raamatud ja ajakirjad, mis käsitlevad looduses ellujäämist, on tavalised, kuid sõjatsoonide teemalisi väljaandeid on vähe.

sentence: Voyagers planning sex reassignment surgery abroad must ensure they're carrying valid documents for the return trip.
sentence_translated: Reisimise planeerijad, kes kavatsevad teha sugudevahetusoperatsiooni välismaal, peavad veenduma, et nad kannavad kehtivaid dokumente tagasireisi jaoks.

sentence: The willingness of governments to issue passports with gender not stated (X) or documents updated to match a desired name and gender varies.
sentence_translated: Valitsuste valmidus väljastada passe, kus sugu ei ole märgitud (X), või dokumente, mis on uuendatud soovitud nime ja soo järgi, varieerub.

sentence: Willingness of foreign governments to honour these documents is just as widely variable.
sentence_translated: Välisriikide valmisolek neid dokumente austada on sama varieeruv.

sentence: Searches at security checkpoints have also become far more intrusive in the post-September 11, 2001 era.
sentence_translated: Julgeolekukontrollide otsingud on pärast 11. septembri 2001 sündmusi muutunud palju pealetükkivamaks.

sentence: Pre-operative transgender people should not expect to pass through the scanners with their privacy and dignity intact.
sentence_translated: Enne operatsiooni transsoolised inimesed ei tohiks oodata, et nad saavad skanneritest mööda minna oma privaatsuse ja väärikuse säilimisega.

sentence: Rip currents are the returning flow from waves breaking off the beach, often at a reef or similar.
sentence_translated: Rippvood on laine murdumise tagasivool rannalt, sageli korallrahude või sarnaste kohtade juures.

sentence: Due to the underwater topology the return flow is concentrated at a few deeper sections, and a fast current to deep water may form there.
sentence_translated: Kuna veealune topoloogia, on tagasivool koondunud mõnesse sügavamasse sektsiooni ja seal võib tekkida kiire vool sügavale vette.

sentence: Most deaths happen as result of fatigue trying to swim back against the current, which may be impossible.
sentence_translated: Enamik surmajuhtumeid toimub väsimuse tõttu, kui üritatakse voolu vastu tagasi ujuda, mis võib olla võimatu.

sentence: As soon as you get out of the current, swimming back is no more difficult than normally.
sentence_translated: Niipea kui sa voolust välja saad, ei ole tagasi ujumine enam keerulisem kui tavaliselt.

sentence: Try aiming somewhere where you are not caught again or, depending on your skills and on whether you have been noticed, you might want to wait for rescue.
sentence_translated: Proovige sihtida kohta, kus teid ei tabata, või sõltuvalt teie oskustest ja sellest, kas teid on märgatud, võiksite oodata päästmist.

sentence: Re-entry shock comes on sooner than culture shock (there's less of a honeymoon phase), lasts longer, and can be more severe.
sentence_translated: Tagasi tuleku šokk saabub varem kui kultuurišokk (kui vähem on mesinädala faasi), kestab kauem ja võib olla tõsisem.

sentence: Travellers who had an easy time adjusting to the new culture sometimes have a particularly hard time readjusting to their native culture.
sentence_translated: Reisijad, kellel oli lihtne uue kultuuriga kohaneda, on mõnikord eriti raskustes oma kodukultuuri tagasi kohandamisega.

sentence: When returning home after living abroad, you've adapted to the new culture and lost some of your habits from your home culture.
sentence_translated: Kui tuled pärast välismaal elamist koju tagasi, oled sa kohanenud uue kultuuriga ja kaotanud osa oma kodukultuuri harjumustest.

sentence: When you went abroad at first, people were probably patient and understanding, knowing that travellers in a new country need to adapt.
sentence_translated: Kui sa esmakordselt välismaale läksid, olid inimesed tõenäoliselt kannatlikud ja mõistvad, teades, et uues riigis reisijad peavad kohanema.

sentence: People may not anticipate that patience and understanding are also necessary for travellers returning home.
sentence_translated: Inimesed ei pruugi oodata, et kannatlikkus ja mõistmine on samuti vajalikud reisijatele, kes naasevad koju.

sentence: The pyramid sound and light show is one of the most interesting things in the area for kids.
sentence_translated: Püramiidi helide ja valguse show on üks kõige huvitavamaid asju piirkonnas lastele.

sentence: You can see the pyramids in the dark and you can see them in silence before the show begins.
sentence_translated: Sa saad vaadata piramide pimeduses ja saad neid vaadata vaikuses enne etenduse algust.

sentence: Usually you always here the sound of tourists and vendors. The story of the sound and light is just like a story book.
sentence_translated: Tavaliselt kuuled sa alati turistide ja müüjate hääli. Helide ja valguse lugu on just nagu muinasjutt.

sentence: The Sphinx is set as the backdrop and the narrator of a long story.
sentence_translated: Sphinx on pika loo taustaks ja jutustajaks.

sentence: The scenes are displayed on the pyramids and the different pyramids are lit up.
sentence_translated: Stseene kuvatakse püramiididel ja erinevad püramiidid on valgustatud.

sentence: South Shetland Islands, discovered in 1819, are claimed by several nations and have the most bases, with sixteen active in 2020.
sentence_translated: Lõuna-Shetlandi saared, avastatud 1819. aastal, on mitme riigi nõudmiste all ja seal on kõige rohkem baase, 2020. aastal oli aktiivseid kuusteist.

sentence: The archipelago lies 120 km north of the Peninsula. The largest is King George Island with the settlement of Villa Las Estrellas.
sentence_translated: Arhipelaag asub 120 km põhjas poolsaarest. Suurim on Kuningas George'i saar koos Villa Las Estrellas'ega.

sentence: Others include Livingston Island, and Deception where the flooded caldera of a still-active volcano provides a spectacular natural harbour.
sentence_translated: Teised hulka kuuluvad Livingstoni saar ja Pettus, kus üleujutatud kaldera endiselt aktiivse vulkaani juures pakub suurepärast looduslikku sadamat.

sentence: Ellsworth Land is the region south of the Peninsula, bounded by the Bellingshausen Sea.
sentence_translated: Ellsworthi maa on piirkond, mis asub poolsaare lõunaosas, piiratud Bellingshauseni merega.

sentence: The mountains of the Peninsula here merge into the plateau, then re-emerge to form the 360 km chain of the Ellsworth Mountains, bisected by the Minnesota Glacier.
sentence_translated: Poolsaare mäed sulanduvad siin platoosse, seejärel kerkivad nad uuesti esile, moodustades 360 km pikkuse Ellsworthi mäestiku, mida läbistab Minnesota liustik.

sentence: The northern part or Sentinel Range has Antarctica's highest mountains, the Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.
sentence_translated: Põhjaosa ehk Sentinel Range sisaldab Antarktika kõrgeimaid mägesid, Vinson Massifi, mille kõrgeim tipp on 4892 m kõrgune Mount Vinson.

sentence: In remote locations, without cell phone coverage, a satellite phone may be your only option.
sentence_translated: Kaugetes kohtades, kus ei ole mobiiltelefonide katvust, võib satelliittelefon olla teie ainus võimalus.

sentence: A satellite phone is not generally a replacement for a mobile phone, as you have to be outdoors with clear line of sight to the satellite to make a phone call.
sentence_translated: Satelliittelefon ei asenda tavaliselt mobiiltelefoni, kuna peate olema õues ja nägema satelliiti, et helistada.

sentence: The service is frequently used by shipping, including pleasure craft, as well as expeditions who have remote data and voice needs.
sentence_translated: Teenust kasutavad sageli laevandussektor, sealhulgas meelelahutuslaevad, samuti ekspeditsioonid, kellel on kauged andme- ja häälvajadused.

sentence: Your local telephone service provider should be able to give more information about connecting to this service.
sentence_translated: Teie kohalik telefoniteenuse pakkuja peaks suutma anda rohkem teavet selle teenusega ühendamise kohta.

sentence: An increasingly more popular option for those planning a gap-year is to travel and learn.
sentence_translated: Üha populaarsem valik nende jaoks, kes plaanivad vaheaastat, on reisida ja õppida.

sentence: This is especially popular with school leavers, allowing them to take a year out before university, without compromising their education.
sentence_translated: See on eriti populaarne koolilõpetajate seas, võimaldades neil võtta aasta vaheaega enne ülikooli, ohverdamata oma haridust.

sentence: In many cases, enrolling on a gap-year course abroad can actually improve your chances of moving into higher education back in your home country.
sentence_translated: Paljudes olukordades võib välismaal vaheaasta kursusele registreerimine tegelikult parandada teie võimalusi naasta oma kodumaa kõrgharidusse.

sentence: Typically there will be a tuition fee to enroll in these educational programs.
sentence_translated: Tavaliselt on nende haridusprogrammide registreerimiseks tasuline õppemaks.

sentence: Finland is a great boating destination. The "Land of a thousand lakes" has thousands of islands too, in the lakes and in the coastal archipelagos.
sentence_translated: Soome on suurepärane paadimatkade sihtkoht. "Tuhande järve maa" on ka tuhandeid saari, nii järvedes kui ka ranniku arhipelaagides.

sentence: In the archipelagos and lakes you do not necessarily need a yacht.
sentence_translated: Arhipelaagides ja järvedes ei ole jahti tingimata vaja.

sentence: Although the coastal archipelagos and the biggest lakes are indeed big enough for any yacht, smaller boats or even a kayak offer a different experience.
sentence_translated: Kuigi rannikualade arhipelaagod ja suurimad järved on tõepoolest piisavalt suured igasuguste jahtide jaoks, pakuvad väiksemad paadid või isegi kajakid hoopis teistsugust kogemust.

sentence: Boating is a national pastime in Finland, with a boat to every seven or eight people.
sentence_translated: Paadiga sõitmine on Soomes rahvuslik ajaviide, kus igal seitsmel või kaheksal inimesel on oma paat.

sentence: This is matched by Norway, Sweden and New Zealand, but otherwise quite unique (e.g. in the Netherlands the figure is one to forty).
sentence_translated: Sellele vastavad Norra, Rootsi ja Uus-Meremaa, kuid muidu on see üsna ainulaadne (nt Hollandis on suhe üks neljakümne).

sentence: Most of the distinct Baltic Cruises feature an extended stay in St. Petersburg, Russia.
sentence_translated: Enamik eristuvaid Balti kruiise sisaldab pikendatud viibimist Peterburis, Venemaal.

sentence: This means you can visit the historic city for a couple of full days while returning and sleeping on the ship at night.
sentence_translated: See tähendab, et saate külastada ajaloolist linna paariks täispäevaks, öösel laevas tagasi tulles ja magades.

sentence: If you only go ashore using shipboard excursions you will not need a separate visa (as of 2009).
sentence_translated: Kui te lähete maale ainult laevaekskursioonide kaudu, ei vaja te eraldi viisat (alates 2009. aastast).

sentence: Some cruises feature Berlin, Germany in the brochures. As you can see from the map above Berlin is no where near the sea and a visit to the city is not included in the price of the cruise.
sentence_translated: Mõned kruiisid sisaldavad brošüürides Berliini, Saksamaad. Nagu näete ülaltoodud kaardilt, ei asu Berliin kusagil mere lähedal ja linna külastamine ei ole kruiisi hinnas.

sentence: Travelling by plane can be a scary experience for people of all ages and backgrounds, particularly if they've not flown before or have experienced a traumatic event.
sentence_translated: Lennureis võib olla hirmutav kogemus inimesetele igas vanuses ja taustaga, eriti kui nad pole varem lennanud või on kogenud traumeerivat sündmust.

sentence: It is not something to be ashamed of: it is no different from the personal fears and dislikes of other things that very many people have.
sentence_translated: See ei ole midagi, mille pärast häbi tunda: see ei erine isiklikest hirmudest ja eelistustest teiste asjade suhtes, mis on väga paljude inimeste seas olemas.

sentence: For some, understanding something about how aircraft work and what happens during a flight may help to overcome a fear which is based on the unknown or on not being in control.
sentence_translated: Mõne jaoks võib lennukite toimimise ja lennu ajal toimuva mõistmine aidata ületada hirmu, mis põhineb teadmatusel või kontrolli puudumisel.

sentence: Courier companies are well paid for delivering things quickly. Frequently, time is very important with business documents, merchandise or spare parts for an urgent repair.
sentence_translated: Kullerfirmad saavad hästi tasustatud asjade kiire kohaletoimetamise eest. Tihti on ajaküsimus äri dokumentide, kaupade või varuosade kiireks remontimiseks väga oluline.

sentence: On some routes, the larger companies have their own planes, but for other routes and smaller firms there was a problem.
sentence_translated: Mõnedes marsruutides on suurematel ettevõtetel oma lennukid, kuid teiste marsruutide ja väiksemate firmade puhul oli probleem.

sentence: If they sent things by air freight, on some routes it may have taken days to get through unloading and customs.
sentence_translated: Kui nad saatsid asju õhutranspordiga, võis mõnel marsruudil laadimise ja tolli läbimine võtta päevi.

sentence: The only way to get it through faster was to send it as checked luggage. Airline regulations will not allow them to send luggage without a passenger, which is where you come in.
sentence_translated: Ainus viis, kuidas seda kiiremini kohale toimetada, oli saata see registreeritud pagasina. Lennufirma eeskirjad ei luba neil saata pagasit ilma reisijata, kus sa sisse astud.

sentence: The obvious way of flying in first or business class is to fork out a thick wad of money for the privilege (or, better yet, get your company to do it for you).
sentence_translated: Ilmselge viis esimeses või äri klassis lendamiseks on välja käia paks rahasumma selle privileegi eest (või veel parem, lasta oma ettevõttel seda sinu eest teha).

sentence: However, this does not come cheap: as rough rules of thumb, you can expect to pay up to four times the normal economy fare for business, and eleven times for first class!
sentence_translated: Siiski ei ole see odav: umbkaudu võite oodata, et äri klassi pilet maksab kuni neli korda rohkem kui tavaline majandusklassi pilet ja esmaklassi pilet kuni üksteist korda rohkem!

sentence: Generally speaking, there is no point in even looking for discounts for business or first-class seats on direct flights from A to B.
sentence_translated: Üldiselt ei ole mõtet isegi otsida allahindlusi äri- või esmaklassi istekohtadele otse lendudel A-st B-sse.

sentence: Airlines know well that there is a certain core group of flyers who are willing to pay top dollar for the privilege of getting somewhere fast and in comfort, and charge accordingly.
sentence_translated: Lennufirmad teavad hästi, et on olemas teatud tuumikgrupp reisijaid, kes on valmis maksma kõrge hinda privileegi eest jõuda kiiresti ja mugavalt, ning seetõttu ka hindavad vastavalt.

sentence: The capital of Moldova is Chişinău. The local language is Romanian, but Russian is widely used.
sentence_translated: Moldova pealinn on Kišinău. Kohalik keel on rumeenia, kuid vene keelt kasutatakse laialdaselt.

sentence: Moldova is a multi-ethnic republic that has suffered from ethnic conflict.
sentence_translated: Moldova on mitme rahvusega vabariik, mis on kannatanud etnilise konflikti all.

sentence: In 1994, this conflict led to the creation of the self-proclaimed Transnistria Republic in eastern Moldova, which has its own government and currency but is not recognised by any UN member country.
sentence_translated: 1994. aastal viis see konflikt idas Moldovas iseeneslikult kuulutatud Transnistria Vabariigi loomisele, millel on oma valitsus ja valuuta, kuid mida ei tunnusta ükski ÜRO liikmesriik.

sentence: Economic links have been re-established between these two parts of Moldova despite the failure in political negotiations.
sentence_translated: Majanduslikud sidemed on taastatud nende kahe Moldova osa vahel vaatamata poliitiliste läbirääkimiste ebaõnnestumisele.

sentence: The major religion in Moldova is Orthodox Christian.
sentence_translated: Moldovas on peamine religioon ortodoksne kristlus.

sentence: İzmir is the third largest city in Turkey with a population of around 3.7 million, the second biggest port after Istanbul, and a very good transport hub.
sentence_translated: Izmiri on Türgi kolmas suurim linn, mille elanikkond on umbes 3,7 miljonit, see on pärast Istanbulit teine suurim sadam ja väga hea transpordikeskus.

sentence: Once the ancient city of Smyrna, it is now a modern, developed, and busy commercial center, set around a huge bay and surrounded by mountains.
sentence_translated: Kord oli see iidne linn Smyrna, nüüd on see kaasaegne, arenenud ja hõivatud kaubanduskeskus, mis asub suure lahe ümber ja on ümbritsetud mägedest.

sentence: The broad boulevards, glass-fronted buildings and modern shopping centers are dotted with traditional red-tiled roofs, the 18th century market, and old mosques and churches, although the city has an atmosphere more of Mediterranean Europe than traditional Turkey.
sentence_translated: Laiad bulvarid, klaasseintega hooned ja kaasaegsed kaubanduskeskused on kaetud traditsiooniliste punaste katusetellistega, 18. sajandi turgude ja vanade mošeede ning kirikutega, kuigi linnal on pigem Vahemere Euroopa atmosfäär kui traditsioonilise Türgi.

sentence: The village of Haldarsvík offer views of the nearby island Eysturoy and has an unusual octagonal church.
sentence_translated: Haldarsvíki küla pakub vaateid lähedal asuvale Eysturoy saarele ning seal on ebatavaline kaheksanurkne kirik.

sentence: In the churchyard, there are interesting marble sculptures of doves over some tombs.
sentence_translated: Kalmistul on huvitavad marmorist tuvi skulptuurid mõne haua kohal.

sentence: It's worth half an hour to stroll about the intriguing village.
sentence_translated: Tasub veeta pool tundi jalutades selles intrigeerivas külas.

sentence: To the north and within easy reach is the romantic and fascinating town of Sintra and which was made famous to foreigners after a glowing account of its splendours recorded by Lord Byron.
sentence_translated: Põhjas ja kergesti ligipääsetav on romantiline ja põnev linn Sintra, mis sai välismaalastele kuulsaks pärast Lord Byroni sädelevat kirjeldust selle hiilgusest.

sentence: Scotturb Bus 403 travels regularly to Sintra, stopping at Cabo da Roca.
sentence_translated: Scotturb Buss 403 sõidab regulaarselt Sintrasse, peatudes Cabo da Rocas.

sentence: Also to the north visit the great Sanctuary of Our Lady of Fatima (Shrine), a place of worldwide famous Marian apparitions.
sentence_translated: Samuti külastage põhjas suurt Fatima Neitsi Pühamu (püha), mis on maailmas tuntud Maarja ilmingute koht.

sentence: Please remember that you are essentially visiting a mass grave site, as well as a site that has an almost incalculable meaning to a significant portion of the world's population.
sentence_translated: Palun pidage meeles, et külastate põhimõtteliselt massihaua asukohta, samuti kohta, millel on peaaegu arvutamatu tähendus olulisele osale maailma rahvastikust.

sentence: There are still many men and women alive who survived their time here, and many more who had loved ones who were murdered or worked to death there, Jews and non-Jews alike.
sentence_translated: Siin on endiselt palju mehi ja naisi, kes elasid üle oma aja siin, ning veelgi rohkem, kelle lähedased tapeti või töötati seal surnuks, nii juudid kui ka mittejuudid.

sentence: Please treat the site with all of the dignity, solemnity and respect it deserves. Do not make jokes about the Holocaust or Nazis.
sentence_translated: Palun kohtle seda kohta kogu väärikuse, pidulikkuse ja austusega, nagu see väärib. Ära tee nalju holokausti või natside üle.

sentence: Do not deface the site by marking or scratching graffiti into structures.
sentence_translated: Ärge rikkuge objekti, märkides või kraapides graffiti struktuuridesse.

sentence: Barcelona's official languages are Catalan and Spanish. About a half prefer to speak Catalan, a vast majority understands it, and virtually everyone knows Spanish.
sentence_translated: Barcelona ametlikud keeled on katalaani ja hispaania keel. Umbes pooled eelistavad rääkida katalaani, suur enamus mõistab seda ja praktiliselt kõik oskavad hispaania keelt.

sentence: However, most signs are indicated only in Catalan because it is established by law as the first official language.
sentence_translated: Siiski on enamik märke näidatud ainult katalaani keeles, kuna see on seadusega kehtestatud esimeseks ametlikuks keeleks.

sentence: Yet, Spanish is also widely used in public transport and other facilities.
sentence_translated: Siiski kasutatakse hispaania keelt laialdaselt ka ühistranspordis ja muudes teenustes.

sentence: Regular announcements in the Metro are made only in Catalan, but unplanned disruptions are announced by an automated system in a wide variety of languages including Spanish, English, French, Arabic and Japanese.
sentence_translated: Metroos tehakse regulaarsed teadaanded ainult katalaani keeles, kuid planeerimata katkestusi kuulutatakse automaatse süsteemi kaudu mitmes erinevas keeles, sealhulgas hispaania, inglise, prantsuse, araabia ja jaapani keeles.

sentence: Parisians have a reputation for being egocentric, rude and arrogant.
sentence_translated: Pariislased on tuntud oma egotsentrilisuse, rude ja ülbusena.

sentence: While this is often only an inaccurate stereotype, the best way to get along in Paris still is to be on your best behavior, acting like someone who is "bien élevé" (well brought up). It will make getting about considerably easier.
sentence_translated: Kuigi see on sageli vaid ebatäpne stereotüüp, on Parises kõige parem viis läbi saada olla oma parimas käitumises, käitudes nagu keegi, kes on "bien élevé" (hästi kasvatatud). See teeb ringi liikumise oluliselt lihtsamaks.

sentence: Parisians' abrupt exteriors will rapidly evaporate if you display some basic courtesies.
sentence_translated: Pariislaste järsud väljanägemised kaovad kiiresti, kui näitate mõningaid põhilisi viisakusi.

sentence: The Plitvice Lakes national park is heavily forested, mainly with beech, spruce, and fir trees, and features a mixture of Alpine and Mediterranean vegetation.
sentence_translated: Plitvice järvede rahvuspark on tihedalt metsaga kaetud, peamiselt pöökide, kuuskede ja nulgudega, ning seal on segu Alpi ja Vahemere taimestikust.

sentence: It has a notably wide variety of plant communities, due to its range of microclimates, differing soils and varying levels of altitude.
sentence_translated: Sellel on märkimisväärselt lai taimede kogukondade mitmekesisus, mis tuleneb selle erinevatest mikroklimaatidest, erinevatest muldadest ja erinevatest kõrgustest.

sentence: The area is also home to an extremely wide variety of animal and bird species.
sentence_translated: See ala on samuti koduks äärmiselt laiale loomade ja lindude liikide mitmekesisusele.

sentence: Rare fauna such as the European brown bear, wolf, eagle, owl, lynx, wild cat and capercaillie can be found there, along with many more common species
sentence_translated: Seal leidub haruldasi loomi, nagu Euroopa pruunkaru, hunt, kotkas, öökull, ilves, metsik kass ja rukkirääk, koos paljude teiste tavalisemate liikidega.

sentence: While visiting the monasteries, women are required to wear skirts covering the knees and have their shoulders covered, too.
sentence_translated: Kloostreid külastades peavad naised kandma põlvi katvaid seelikuid ja nende õlad peavad samuti olema kaetud.
