sentence: Most of the monasteries do provide wraps for women who come unprepared, but if you bring your own, especially one with bright colors, you'll get a smile from the monk or nun at the entrance.
sentence_translated: Enamik kloostritest pakub naistele, kes tulevad ettevalmistamata, katteid, kuid kui toote oma, eriti erksavärvilise, saate naeratuse kloostri või nunnalt sissepääsu juures.

sentence: Along the same line, men are required to wear trousers covering the knees.
sentence_translated: Sama mõtte jätkuna on meestelt nõutud, et nad kannaksid põlvi katvaid pükse.

sentence: This too can be borrowed from the stock at the entrance but that clothing isn't washed after every user so you may not feel comfortable wearing these skirts. One size fits all for men!
sentence_translated: Seda saab samuti laenata sissepääsu juures olevast varudest, kuid neid riideid ei pesta pärast iga kasutajat, seega ei pruugi sa end nende seelikute kandmisel mugavalt tunda. Üks suurus sobib kõigile meestele!

sentence: Majorcan cuisine, like that of similar zones in the Mediterranean, is based on bread, vegetables and meat (specially pork), and uses olive oil throughout.
sentence_translated: Mallorca köök, nagu ka sarnastes Vahemere piirkondades, põhineb leival, köögiviljadel ja lihal (eriti sealihal) ning kasutab pidevalt oliiviõli.

sentence: A simple popular dinner, especially during the summer, is the Pa amb Oli: Bread with olive oil, tomato, and any available condiments such as cheese, tunafish, etc.
sentence_translated: Lihtne populaarne õhtusöök, eriti suvel, on Pa amb Oli: leib oliiviõli, tomati ja mistahes saadaval olevate lisanditega nagu juust, tuunikala jne.

sentence: All nouns, alongside the word Sie for you, always begin with a capital letter, even in the middle of a sentence.
sentence_translated: Kõik nimisõnad, koos sõnaga Sie teie jaoks, algavad alati suure tähega, isegi lause keskel.

sentence: This is an important way to distinguish between some verbs and objects.
sentence_translated: See on oluline viis eristada mõningaid tegusõnu ja objekte.

sentence: It also arguably makes reading easier, though writing is somewhat complicated by the need to find out whether a verb or adjective is used in a substantivized form.
sentence_translated: See muudab lugemise kahtlemata lihtsamaks, kuigi kirjutamine on mõnevõrra keeruline, kuna tuleb välja selgitada, kas verbi või omadussõna kasutatakse substantiviseeritud kujul.

sentence: Pronunciation is relatively easy in Italian since most words are pronounced exactly how they are written
sentence_translated: Hääldamine on itaalia keeles suhteliselt lihtne, kuna enamik sõnu hääldatakse täpselt nii, nagu need on kirjutatud.

sentence: The main letters to watch out for are c and g, since their pronunciation varies based on the following vowel.
sentence_translated: Peamised tähed, millele tähelepanu pöörata, on c ja g, kuna nende hääldus varieerub sõltuvalt järgnevast täishäälikust.

sentence: Also, make sure to pronounce r and rr differently: caro means dear, whereas carro means chariot.
sentence_translated: Lisaks veenduge, et hääldate r ja rr erinevalt: caro tähendab kallis, samas kui carro tähendab vankrit.

sentence: Persian has a relatively easy and mostly regular grammar.
sentence_translated: Persia keele grammatika on suhteliselt lihtne ja enamasti regulaarne.

sentence: Therefore, reading this grammar primer would help you learn much about Persian grammar and understand phrases better.
sentence_translated: Seetõttu aitaks selle grammatika algõpikuga lugemine teil palju teada saada pärsia grammatikast ja paremini mõista fraase.

sentence: Needless to say, if you know a Romance language, it will be easier for you to learn Portuguese.
sentence_translated: Kohatu öelda, et kui sa tead mõnda romaani keelt, siis on sul portugeesi õppimine lihtsam.

sentence: However, people who know a little Spanish may hastily conclude that Portuguese is close enough that it need not be studied separately.
sentence_translated: Kuid inimesed, kes oskavad natuke hispaania keelt, võivad kiirustades järeldada, et portugali keel on piisavalt sarnane, et seda ei pea eraldi õppima.

sentence: Pre-modern observatories are usually obsolete today, and remain as museums, or sites of education.
sentence_translated: Eelmodernsed observatooriumid on tänapäeval tavaliselt vananenud ja jäävad muuseumideks või hariduse kohtadeks.

sentence: As light pollution in their heyday was not the kind of problem it is today, they are usually located in cities or at campuses, easier to reach than those built in modern times.
sentence_translated: Kuna valgusreostus oma hiilgeajal ei olnud probleem, nagu see on täna, asuvad nad tavaliselt linnades või ülikoolilinnakutes, olles kergemini ligipääsetavad kui need, mis on ehitatud kaasaegsetel aegadel.

sentence: Most modern research telescopes are enormous facilities in remote areas with favorable atmospheric conditions.
sentence_translated: Enamik kaasaegseid uurimisteleskoope on tohutud rajatised eemal asuvates piirkondades, kus on soodsad atmosfäärilised tingimused.

sentence: Cherry blossom viewing, known as hanami, has been a part of Japanese culture since the 8th century.
sentence_translated: Kirsilillede vaatamine, tuntud kui hanami, on olnud osa Jaapani kultuurist alates 8. sajandist.

sentence: The concept came from China where plum blossoms were the flower of choice.
sentence_translated: Kontseptsioon tuli Hiinast, kus ploomiõied olid valitud lilleks.

sentence: In Japan, the first cherry blossom parties were hosted by the emperor only for himself and other members of the aristocracy around the Imperial Court.
sentence_translated: Jaapanis korraldas esimese kirsilillepeo keiser ainult enda ja teiste aadli liikmete jaoks, kes kuulusid keiserlikku õukonda.

sentence: Plants look their best when in a natural environment, so resist the temptation to remove even "just one" specimen.
sentence_translated: Taimeid näeb kõige paremini nende looduslikus keskkonnas, seega vastupanu kiusatusele eemaldada isegi "ainult üks" isend.

sentence: If visiting a formally arranged garden, collecting "specimens" is also going to get you ejected, without discussion.
sentence_translated: Kui külastate ametlikult korraldatud aeda, toob "näidiste" kogumine teid samuti välja viskamise, ilma arutelu võimaluseta.

sentence: Singapore is generally an extremely safe place to be and very easy to navigate, and you can buy almost anything after arriving.
sentence_translated: Singapur on üldiselt äärmiselt turvaline koht, kus viibida, ja seda on väga lihtne navigeerida, ning pärast saabumist saab osta peaaegu kõike.

sentence: But being placed in the "high tropics" just a few degrees north of equator you will need to deal with both heat (always) and strong sun (when the sky is clear, more rarely).
sentence_translated: Kuid olles paigutatud "kõrgetesse troopikatesse", vaid mõne kraadi võrra ekvaatorist põhja pool, peate tegelema nii kuumuse (alati) kui ka tugeva päikesega (kui taevas on selge, harvemini).

sentence: There are also a few buses going north to Hebron, the traditional burial place of the Biblical patriarchs Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and their wives.
sentence_translated: Põhja suunas Hebronisse sõidab ka paar bussi, mis on traditsiooniline matmispaik piibellikest patriarhidest Abrahamile, Iisakile, Jaakobile ja nende naistele.

sentence: Check that the bus you are thinking of taking goes into Hebron and not just to the nearby Jewish settlement of Kiryat Arba.
sentence_translated: Kontrollige, et buss, mida te plaanite võtta, sõidab Hebronisse, mitte lihtsalt lähedal asuvasse juudi asundusse Kiryat Arba.

sentence: Inland waterways can be a good theme to base a holiday around.
sentence_translated: Siseveeteed võivad olla hea teema, mille ümber puhkus korraldada.

sentence: For example visiting castles in the Loire Valley, the Rhine valley or taking a cruise to interesting cites on the Danube or boating along the Erie Canal.
sentence_translated: Näiteks losside külastamine Loira orus, Reini orus või huvitavate linnade külastamine Doonaul või paadimatk Erie kanalil.

sentence: They also define routes for popular hiking and cycling trails.
sentence_translated: Nad määratlevad ka marsruute populaarsetele matka- ja jalgrattateedele.

topic: Reason to travel/Christmas and New Year
sentence: Christmas is one of the most important holidays of Christianity, and is celebrated as the birthday of Jesus.
sentence_translated: Jõulud on üks tähtsamaid kristlikke pühi ja neid tähistatakse Jeesuse sünnipäevana.

topic: Reason to travel/Christmas and New Year
sentence: Many of the traditions surrounding the holiday have been adopted also by non-believers in Christian countries and non-Christians around the world.
sentence_translated: Paljud traditsioonid, mis ümbritsevad seda püha, on omaks võtnud ka mitteusklikud kristlikest riikidest ja mitte-kristlased üle kogu maailma.

sentence: There's a tradition to pass the Easter night awake at some exposed point to see the sunrise.
sentence_translated: On traditsioon veeta ülestõusmispühade öö ärkvel mõnes avatud kohas, et näha päikesetõusu.

sentence: There are of course Christian theological explanations for this tradition, but it may well be a pre-Christian Spring and Fertility ritual.
sentence_translated: Muidugi on selle traditsiooni jaoks olemas kristlikud teoloogilised seletused, kuid see võib olla ka eel-kristlik kevade ja viljakuse rituaal.

sentence: More traditional churches often hold an Easter Vigil on Saturday night during the Easter weekend, with the congregations often breaking into celebration at the stroke of midnight to celebrate Christ's resurrection.
sentence_translated: Rohkem traditsioonilised kirikud peavad sageli ülestõusmispühade öövalvet laupäeva õhtul ülestõusmispühade nädalavahetusel, kus kogudused sageli murravad tähistamisse keskööl, et tähistada Kristuse ülestõusmist.

sentence: All animals that originally arrived in the islands came here either by swimming, flying or floating.
sentence_translated: Kõik loomad, kes algselt saartesse saabusid, tulid siia kas ujudes, lennates või triivides.

sentence: Due to the long distance from the continent mammals were unable to make the journey making the giant tortoise the primary grazing animal in the Galapagos.
sentence_translated: Kuna mandrist oli pikk vahemaa, ei suutnud imetajad seda teekonda ette võtta, mistõttu oli hiiglaslik kilpkonn Galapagose peamine karjatamisloom.

sentence: Since the arrival of man to the Galapagos, many mammals have been introduced including goats, horses, cows, rats, cats and dogs.
sentence_translated: Kuna inimene saabus Galapagosele, on sinna tutvustatud palju imetajaid, sealhulgas kitsi, hobuseid, lehmi, rottide, kasse ja koeri.

sentence: If you visit the Arctic or Antarctic areas in the winter you will experience the polar night, which means that the sun doesn't rise above the horizon.
sentence_translated: Kui külastate talvel Arktika või Antarktika piirkondi, kogete polaarniget, mis tähendab, et päike ei tõuse horisondi kohale.

sentence: This offers a good opportunity to see the Aurora borealis, as the sky will be dark more or less around the clock.
sentence_translated: See pakub head võimalust näha põhjapoolkera virmalisi, kuna taevas on enam-vähem kogu ööpäeva pime.

sentence: As the areas are sparsely populated, and light pollution therefore often not a problem, you will also be able to enjoy the stars.
sentence_translated: Kuna alad on hõredalt asustatud ja valgusreostus ei ole seetõttu sageli probleem, saate nautida ka tähti.

sentence: Japanese work culture is more hierarchical and formal that what Westerners may be used to.
sentence_translated: Jaapani töö kultuur on hierarhilisem ja formaalsem kui see, millega lääne inimesed võivad harjunud olla.

sentence: Suits are standard business attire, and coworkers call each other by their family names or by job titles.
sentence_translated: Ülikonnad on standardne äririietus ja kolleegid kutsuvad üksteist perenime või ametinime järgi.

sentence: Workplace harmony is crucial, emphasizing group effort rather than praising individual accomplishments.
sentence_translated: Töökohtade harmoonia on ülioluline, rõhutades grupitööd individuaalsete saavutuste kiitmise asemel.

sentence: Workers must often get their superiors' approval for any decisions they make, and are expected to obey their superiors' instructions without question.
sentence_translated: Töötajad peavad sageli saama oma ülemuste heakskiidu kõigi tehtud otsuste jaoks ja neilt oodatakse, et nad järgivad oma ülemuste juhiseid kahtluse alla seadmata.
